Name: Lindt & Sprüngli Italia
Description: Grazie all'entusiasmo e alla passione condivisa, che hanno caratterizzato i nostri quasi 175 anni di storia, siamo oggi la più grande azienda produttrice di Cioccolato di Alta Qualità, con un'ampia varietà di prodotti di eccellenza. Con centri produttivi in Europa e negli Stati Uniti, 14.000 collaboratori nel mondo di cui circa 1200 in Italia, ogni giorno ci impegniamo per realizzare la nostra Mission: Incantare il mondo con il Cioccolato! Lavorare in Lindt & Sprungli significa far parte di un'azienda solida e prestigiosa, che mette le proprie persone al centro in un ambiente di lavoro positivo e creativo. Siamo convinti che ognuno possa fare la differenza, ma è il lavoro di squadra orientato alla qualità e all'innovazione il nostro valore aggiunto. Se sei alla ricerca di attività stimolanti, responsabilità crescenti e opportunità di confronto diretto con la leadership, Lindt è l'azienda giusta per te! Lascia il segno con il tuo talento e fai spuntare sul tuo viso un vero "Chocolate Smile

Name: Grupo CASSA (Compañía Azucarera Salvadoreña)
Description: Somos un universo de conocimiento, de innovación y tecnología agroindustrial que produce azúcar, melaza y energía renovable a partir de la caña de azúcar; y lo hacemos sosteniblemente con el propósito de llevar buenas energías de nuestra tierra a cada hogar al que llegan nuestros productos y servicios.

Name: Josef Manner & Comp. AG
Description: Die Firma Josef Manner & Comp AG ist ein heute schon selten gewordenes Beispiel eines erfolgreichen österreichischen Großunternehmens, welches an der Wiener Börse notiert und der Aktienbesitz sich seit der Gründung zum Großteil noch immer in Familienbesitz befindet.

Name: Transmara Sugar Company
Description:
Transmara Sugar Company Limited is a Kenyan company that produces Mara Sugar, a sugar made by locals, for locals.

Our company is named after Kenya’s Transmara region, where the sugarcane milled to produce Mara Sugar is grown.

We only produce Mara Sugar from locally grown sugarcane because we believe in always supporting local people, building the economy and strengthening Kenya’s sugar trade at home.

Since we first started making Mara Sugar in 2012, we have gone from producing 17,000 tonnes of sugar to over 90,000 tonnes in 2021. Our plan is to maintain a stable production of over 100,000 tonnes annually going forward.

Name: Farjami_Group | گروه فرجامی
Description:
producer of wafers, biscuits, tahini & etc

*What is the secret of our yummy biscuit?*
The story of Farjami biscuits started from 1980 *in a local bakery in Yazd* , a city that is well known for its sweets and confectionary industry in Iran, where our unique recipe was brought to perfection. A tasteful crunchy bite from a *biscuit made with love* and happiness that *makes your day.*

Name: Italia Zuccheri - COPROB s.c.a.
Description:
We are proud to be Italia Zuccheri. Growers with care. 

Italia Zuccheri is the only brand of Italian sugar industry that, through the COPROB cooperative, is committed to the protection of 5000 farms, producing one of the most important raw materials of the agri-food system. From the approximately 30,000 hectares of cultivated land, every year comes a wide range of products branded Italia Zuccheri, including 'Semolato 100% Italiano', 'Nostrano' and 'Nostrano Biologico', all 100% Made in Italy and guaranteed from the field to the table.


Thanks to the valuable work of farmers, united since 1962 in a cooperative for the cultivation of beets and committed to the protection and respect of the agricultural territory, the production today covers 15% of the national needs. With a highly innovative approach aimed at an increasingly sustainable agriculture, Italia Zuccheri combines fair cooperation with environmental awareness and the guarantee of a 100% controlled supply chain for the protection of a national heritage as important as that of beet cultivation: one of the most virtuous in terms of greenhouse gas emissions and of strategic importance in the agricultural rotation. 

Website: www.italiazuccheri.it - www.coprob.com 

Certifications: http://bit.ly/Certificazioni-COPROB 

Consumer products: http://bit.ly/Prodotti-Consumatore 

Professional products: http://bit.ly/Prodotti-Professionisti

Name: Eridania
Description: Eridania Italia is in charge of the acquisition,warehousing, confectioning, promotion, sale and overall of the commercialization and distribution of alimentary products in the European Union through an innovative and efficient model of production and distribution aiming to enhance and integrate the entire supply chain.

Name: Trolli GmbH
Description: With its headquarters based in Fürth (Bavaria, Germany) our family-owned business has been making its mark on the gummy candy industry since 1975. Our creations such as the delicious top seller “Saure Glühwürmchen” (Sour Glowworms) and “Apfelringe” (Apple Rings) on the one hand and innovative concepts made with an eye for details like “Burger“ and “Glotzer” (Pop Eye) on the other hand delight consumers around the world in more than 100 countries. Insatiable curiosity paired with the spirit of crazy inventiveness have been our drivers from day one and our 1,700 employees worldwide across Germany, Spain, China and the US are pleased to delight an ever-growing fan base around the globe. Trolli combines the benefits of a family business such as team spirit, openness and appreciation with those of an international working environment. Our culture is characterized by personal interaction, dear and friendly colleagues with hands-on mentality and flat hierarchies. Short decision paths empower all employees to bring fresh ideas to the table to make a real impact on the business and ensure Trolli’s quality and values day by day. We want to build our brand together and spread the ultimate gummy candy fun all over the world! Life is far too important to be taken seriously. This is the motto inside every Trolli bag of sweets. Since 1975 Trolli has been a specialist for totally crazy and unique fruit gum and marshmallow creations. Trolli’s flair for trends, technical know-how and quality consciousness are the basis for this. Quality you can taste! What are you waiting for?

Name: Lindt & Sprüngli Deutschland
Description:
Willkommen bei Lindt & Sprüngli Deutschland.
  
Lindt ist mehr als nur ein Unternehmen, das Chocolade herstellt. Unsere Teams setzen jeden Tag unsere gemeinsame Passion um: Die Welt mit Chocolade zu verzaubern. 

Bei Lindt treffen Tradition und Innovation aufeinander: Seit 180 Jahren vertreten wir traditionelle Werte und erfinden uns immer wieder neu. Unsere Kultur ist visionär. Wir sind neugierig und geprägt von Verantwortung – bei uns wird jede Idee gehört und jedes Talent gefördert. 

Unsere Teams geben täglich das Beste, um unsere zartschmelzende Premium Chocolade herzustellen und stehen mit Leidenschaft und Hingabe hinter jedem Lindt Produkt.

Lindt & Sprüngli Deutschland hat seinen Hauptsitz sowie die Produktion in Aachen und gehört zu der globalen Lindt & Sprüngli Gruppe, mit Sitz in der Schweiz. Unsere über 60 Lindt Shops sind deutschlandweit zu finden. Insgesamt arbeiten über 2.800 Mitarbeitende aus über 80 Nationen bei uns. 

Ob Berufseinsteiger, Berufserfahrene oder Schüler und Schülerinnen – wir bieten spannende Einstiegsmöglichkeiten in verschiedenen Bereichen an.

Name: Horreia Food Industries
Description:
Horreia Food Industries was founded by the Fendi family in Egypt in 1966. Our story started with a desire to create high-quality, unique sweets and chocolates, beginning in the early 1970s with the Chicohend Brand, which quickly expanded to become a market leader in the Fourré market, resulting in the invention of the Saula Brand in the 1990s. Both Elite and Farha Brands were added in 2014 and 2015, respectively, to meet customers’ needs in Egypt and the MENA region.
Horreia is currently the market leader in Egypt in the Candy market. And currently holding the 4th biggest market share in the Coated Wafers Market.

Name: People at Indus Sugar Mills Limited
Description:
Welcome to Indus Sugar Mills Limited, a trusted name in sugar manufacturing since 1980.

Our team at Indus Sugar Mills Limited is the heart of our success. With a crushing capacity of 14,000 TCD in Rajanpur, we're dedicated to producing high-quality sugar products that meet the industry's highest standards.

From skilled agriculturalists to diligent technicians and visionary managers, our people are committed to excellence in every aspect of our operations. Together, we're driven by a shared passion for quality, sustainability, and innovation.

Join us on LinkedIn to connect with our talented team, explore career opportunities, and stay updated on the latest news and industry insights from Indus Sugar Mills Limited. Let's sweeten the world together.

Name: Sally Williams Fine Foods
Description: Handcrafted Nougat, Turkish Delight and Belgian Chocolate with roasted nibs of nougat, to fulfil the needs of everyday indulgence.

Name: BDSI – Bundesverband der Deutschen Süßwarenindustrie e.V.
Description:
Der BDSI vertritt die wirtschaftlichen Interessen der überwiegend mittelständischen Unternehmen der deutschen Süßwarenindustrie. Er ist sowohl Wirtschafts- als auch Arbeitgeberverband. Die Mitgliedschaft ist wahlweise mit oder ohne Tarifbindung möglich. Die BDSI-Mitglieder repräsentieren rund 90 % des Wertes der Süßwarenproduktion in Deutschland. Zum BDSI gehören folgende Produktbereiche (Fachsparten):

    Schokolade, Schokoladenerzeugnisse und Kakao
    Feine Backwaren
    Bonbons und Zuckerwaren
    Knabberartikel
    Markeneis
    Kaugummi
    Rohmassen

Aufgaben des BDSI

    Fachverband mit 200 Mitgliedsunternehmen und ihren etwa 250 Betrieben
    schlagkräftiger Interessenvertreter auf nationaler, europäischer und internationaler Ebene
    Sprachrohr der Süßwarenindustrie in der Öffentlichkeit
    Serviceleister, Informationsmittler und Problemlöser für seine Mitglieder

 
Die Süßwarenindustrie in Zahlen

Die deutsche Süßwarenindustrie nimmt mit einem Anteil von etwa 10% am Umsatz der deutschen Ernährungsindustrie in dieser Branche einen führenden Rang ein. Ihr besonderes Kennzeichen ist ihre starke Exportorientierung. Als Verarbeiter landwirtschaftlicher Produkte trägt die deutsche Süßwarenindustrie auch maßgeblich zur Förderung der Agrarwirtschaft bei.

 
Kennziffern der deutschen Süßwarenindustrie

Der BDSI veröffentlicht regelmäßig Zahlen der Süßwarenbranche zu den Bereichen Umsatz, Produktion, Export, Import und Rohstoffverarbeitung. Die aktuellen Zahlen und Infografiken finden Sie in dem Bereich Zahlen & Fakten

Name: White Nile Sugar Company
Description:
The White Nile Sugar Project entered the sugar industry in 2004 and has since positioned itself as a leading provider of processed sugar-based products derived from sugar cane.

The company was designed as an energy-efficient production entity utilising the significant energy mass in sugar cane plantations to produce necessary food and energy products.

With the environment in mind, these products are being manufactured in a cost-effective manner using cutting-edge technology and therefore enabling the company to become a cost leader in its field.

As a socially responsible company, the WNSC also paved the way for communities in the centre of Sudan to sustainable growth and prosperity. Such transformation has been developed and managed in harmony with nature and the environment, making it possible for these communities to have sustainable access to clean water, health care and primary education.

The company has been led by a group of visionary investors who aim to secure food, animal feed and energy products for Sudan and the rest of the Sub-Saharan African communities.

Name: Candy Factory Angola
Description:
A Candy Factory Angola é uma empresa angolana, criada em 2018, com o objetivo de produzir e comercializar produtos de confeitaria de açúcar de qualidade, inovadores e confiáveis, de Angola para o mundo. A sua produção de rebuçados, sambapitos e pastilhas elásticas de variados sabores arrancou em Setembro de 2022, na sua fábrica situada na Zona Económica Especial, em Viana – Luanda. 

Fruto de uma sólida parceria entre dois actores da distribuição em Angola e no estrangeiro, o projecto Candy Factory é hoje uma realidade que representa mais um passo dado para a diversificação da economia, nomeadamente no sector da Confeitaria em Angola. 

Com uma capacidade de produção de mais de 6.700 toneladas por ano (mais de 15 toneladas por dia, por turno), a Candy Factory pretende contribuir para uma redução considerável da importação regular de sambapitos, rebuçados e pastilhas elásticas, proporcionando ao mercado angolano productos com preços e qualidade confiáveis. 

Com uma fábrica topo de gama, equipada com os modelos mais sofisticados de maquinaria industrial de origem alemã, francesa e holandesa, a Candy Factory garante produtos de alta qualidade produzidos exclusivamente em Angola. Além disso, com cerca de 150 colaboradores, dos quais mais de 90% são Angolanos, a aposta na contratação e desenvolvimento do capital humano em Angola é também um objectivo determinante que constitui um dos principais pilares da sua missão. 

A Candy Factory pretende chegar ao coração dos seus consumidores, de idades e gostos diferentes, através de marcas diferenciadas, com o intuito de se tornar “O Sorriso + Doce” de Angola.

Name: Mehran Sugar Mills Limited

Name: MAGADH SUGAR & ENERGY LTD
Description:
Magadh Sugar & Energy Limited, part of the esteemed K.K. Birla Group, operates state-of-the-art sugar complexes in Bihar at Narkatiaganj, Sidhwalia, and Hasanpur. Established on March 19, 2015, through strategic mergers and demergers, our core integrated operation comprises of sugar and its by-products ethanol and co-generation of power with biofuel. The units were established in 1930s.

Engaging over 1,00,000 cane farmers and employing 1,200+ skilled professionals, we are focused on creating green & sustainable sugar complex. We have expanded our portfolio beyond Sugar to become a major Bio-energy producer in Bihar, generating green power and Ethanol. We at Magadh Sugar & Energy Limited are committed to contributing to a circular economy by adding value through the entire supply chain. Listed on NSE and BSE, we prioritize People Care, EHS, community development and governance. Transitioning to a biofuel focus, we align with national priorities and environmental initiatives, shaping the future of the industry.

The Company has three sugar mills in Bihar with a combined crushing capacity of 19,000 TCD, two distilleries with an overall ethanol production capacity of 155 KLPD on B-heavy molasses / syrup and a cogeneration facility that can produce 38 MW power.

Name: Schweizer Zucker AG
Description:
Auszug aus dem Leitbild
Die Schweizer Zucker AG (SZU) verarbeitet als einziges Unternehmen in der Schweiz Zuckerrüben und versorgt den Schweizer Markt mit Zucker und den anfallenden Futtermitteln. Der SZU kommt dadurch hinsichtlich Menge, Qualität und Lieferbereitschaft eine marktführende Position zu. 

Produktsicherheit 
Unsere Produkte erfüllen die hohen Anforderungen der in der Schweiz produzierenden Lebensmittelindustrie an die Lebensmittelsicherheit. Besonderen Wert legen wir auf die stetige Verbesserung unserer Prozesse und Produkte. Verlässliche zertifizierte Produktionsstandards und die Rückverfolgbarkeit unserer Produkte unterstützen uns dabei in hohem Masse. 

Management und Mitarbeitende 
Wir fördern eine hohe Identifikation unserer Mitarbeitenden mit ihren Aufgaben und gewähren ihnen in ihrem Handeln unternehmerischen Spielraum. Wir pflegen einen kooperativen Führungsstil mit klaren Zielsetzungen und weitreichender Selbständigkeit. Wir fördern Information und Kommunikation sowie die Ausbildung der Mitarbeitenden. Wir haben eine schlanke Organisation und eine hohe Effizienz der Abläufe im ganzen Unternehmen. Die Gesundheit und Sicherheit unserer Mitarbeitenden hat hohe Priorität 

Umwelt 
Die gesamte Produktionskette zur Gewinnung von Schweizer Zucker ist nach ökologischen Gesichtspunkten ausgerichtet. Der Zuckerrübenanbau folgt einer geregelten, gesunden Fruchtfolge. Bei den Produktionsprozessen werden der Energieverbrauch und die Immissionen minimiert und die Betriebsmittel in umweltverträglichen Kreisläufen wiederverwendet. 

Kommunikation 
Wir informieren Aktionäre, Mitarbeitende, Marktpartner und die Öffentlichkeit regelmässig mit hoher Transparenz über unsere Aktivitäten und Ergebnisse. 

Gesetzeskonformität 
Wir sind bestrebt die Gesetzeskonformität in allen Bereichen der Unternehmung nach bestem Wissen und Gewissen jederzeit zu gewährleisten.

Name: Lindt & Sprüngli Austria
Description:
Wir sind eine eigenständige Tochtergesellschaft der Lindt & Sprüngli Gruppe mit über 300 Mitarbeitern mit Sitz in Wien und Produktionsstätte in Niederösterreich. Neben der Marke „Lindt“  führen wir auch die beiden Traditionsmarken „Hofbauer“ und „Küfferle“. 

Als dynamisch wachsendes Unternehmen am österreichischen Süßwarenmarkt gehen wir unseren Weg mit viel Leidenschaft, Begeisterung und Einsatz sowie einer großen Portion Spaß als Team!

Was uns auszeichnet
Unsere Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter. Das hebt uns von allen ab. Wir wissen, dass es darauf ankommt, die richtigen Personen einzustellen. Wir alle sind motivierte, leidenschaftliche Menschen, die etwas bewegen möchten. Ganz egal, ob wir die Marken als Teil des Marketingteams managen, mit unseren nationalen Einzelhandelskunden im Verkaufsteam zusammenarbeiten oder in einem der exklusiven Lindt Schokoladengeschäfte an vorderster Front stehen - wir lieben, was wir tun.

Name: Friis Holm Chokolade
Description:
Friis-Holm Chocolate is based on the idea of creating the world's best chocolate. 

Both best in taste, but also best for the world.

When we talk about sustainability and decency, it is not something we just talk about. It is our DNA and something we act on - not just with certifications and reports which often works more like alibies than actually making a change – but as an integral part of how we think, buy and produce.

We are making chocolate couverture for some of Denmark's best restaurants, among them several with Michelin stars or Bib-gourmands. We proudly supply Henne Kirkeby Kro, Relæ, Alchemist, Jordnær, Allouette, Dragsholm slot, Noma, Kødbyens fiskebar and many more. We also proudly supply chocolate to some fantastic bakeries – among these Mirabelle, Juno,  Bread Station and Brød.

We believe that working with these innovative craftsmen keeps us sharp and always thinking on how we can make our chocolate even better.

We share a philosophy of quality, fairness, and the importance of being present in the local community. At the same time, we have a transparent open production.
Our production line is formed as a horse shoe and in the middle we have a hallway with windows – making it possible to see how we make the worlds best chocolate. We invite you to come and see how we do.
 
We look forward to the years to come - lots of tasty chocolate, and still with the idea and practice of being the “Best in the world” and the “Best for the world”.

Name: PT Pratama Nusantara Sakti

We have vision to become the first and the largest sugar company in low land or swamp land in Indonesia, which become priority to realize “Swasembada Gula”

Name: Habib Sugar Mills Ltd. Nawabshah
Description:
In 1962, Habib Sugar Mills Limited became a Public Limited Company in Karachi, with its plant located 300 kilometers northeast in Nawabshah. Initially, the sugar division used machinery from M/s. B.M.A. in Germany and employed the Double Carbonation Double Sulphitation (D.C.D.S) process, with a daily sugarcane crushing capacity of 1,500 tons.

Production began in January 1964, becoming the second sugar mill in Sindh. Capacity grew to 11,000 tons daily through Balancing, Modernization, and Replacement (B.M.R) initiatives. Manufacturing shifted from D.C.D.S to Defecation Remelt Carbonation Sulphitation (D.R.C.S) as part of B.M.R.

In 1967-68, a distillery producing methanol from molasses was added, boosting profitability and exports. In 1978-79, a Karachi-based textile division focused on exports was established. The company also set up a tank terminal at Karachi port for bulk liquid cargo, including molasses, edible oil, and methanol.

Since inception, the company's capital base grew from Rs. 12 million to Rs. 750 million.

Sugar, Distillery, Textile, Trade, and Bulk Storage Terminal:

    Habib Sugar Mills Ltd.
        Established as a Public Limited Company in 1962.
    Sugar Division
        Equipped with a daily crushing capacity of 11,000 metric tons of sugarcane.
    Distillery Division
        Capable of producing 142,500 liters of industrial alcohol daily.
    Textile Division
        Specializes in producing terry towels and bath robes, with an annual capacity of 560,000 kilograms of high-value finished products.
    Trade Division
        Facilitates the import and export of various commodities, including sugar and molasses.
    Bulk Storage Terminal
        An integral part of the Distillery Division, offering extensive bulk storage facilities for molasses, industrial alcohol, and edible oils at Karachi port, catering to import and export needs.

#SugarMills #Distillery #TextileIndustry #TradeDivision #BulkStorageTerminal #CorporateHistory #Manufacturing

Name: CARAMELOS DE LA ROSA

Creating Moments to Savour
We imagine with passion and manufacture with care unique chocolate products for people to savour and share.

All Lamontagne products are:
 Peanut-Free

Want to develop a chocolate product that stands out? Let’s create something exceptional — together.

Name: Habib Sugar Mills Limited
Description:
At Habib Sugar Mills Limited, we've been defining excellence in the sugar industry since 1962. With our Head Office in Karachi and our cutting-edge plant located in Nawabshah, we are committed to innovation, quality, and sustainability. 
Established as a Public Limited Company, our journey began in 1964 as the second sugar mill in the province of Sindh. Over the years, we've expanded our capacity to crush 11,000 tons of sugarcane per day, thanks to strategic upgrades and modernization. 
In 1978-79, we diversified our portfolio by entering textile manufacturing in Karachi, contributing significantly to the export market. Our tank terminal in the Port area of Karachi further enhances our capabilities in handling and storing bulk liquid cargo. 
Our commitment to excellence has earned us accolades, including the Trophy and Certificate of Merit from the Karachi Stock Exchange and the prestigious International Gold Mercury Award. We are also proud recipients of the highest sucrose recovery award from the Pakistan Society of Sugar Technologists. 
We prioritize a pollution-free environment. Our investments of approximately Rs. 60 million in fly ash removal systems and slop treatment plants have transformed our operations, ensuring a cleaner and healthier Nawabshah. 

Be part of our vibrant LinkedIn community as we continue to lead, innovate, and contribute to the sustainable growth of the sugar industry. Follow us for updates on industry trends, corporate initiatives, and exciting career opportunities.

Name: Dragée Chocolates
Description:
Em meio ao turbilhão da pandemia em 2020, uma visão divina deu origem à Dragée Chocolates. Uma cena que envolvia um barril colossal, de onde jorrava chocolate, inspirou a criação de algo mais doce em tempos tão amargos.

Este sonho não se limitou a ser apenas uma visão, mas transformou-se em ação concreta. Começamos nossa jornada na pitoresca cidade de Campos do Jordão, famosa por sua rica tradição em chocolates finos. Nossa missão era clara: trazer o melhor desse mundo delicioso para todos.

O sonho cresceu, assim como nossas operações. Em vez de apenas trazer chocolates de outros lugares, abrimos várias frentes para expandir nossa atuação. Em 2021, um ano após o nascimento do nosso sonho, unimos forças com uma renomada confeiteira em São Paulo, criando uma aliança doce e poderosa.

E hoje? Hoje, a Dragée Chocolates orgulhosamente opera a partir de sua própria fábrica. Transformamos uma visão de um mundo mais doce em uma realidade palpável, cheia de prazeres de chocolate. Continuamos a entrelaçar sonhos com a arte de fazer chocolate, levando alegria para os paladares e corações de todos os que provam nossos produtos.

E assim, a Dragée Chocolates convida você para juntar-se a nós nessa deliciosa viagem. Porque acreditamos que cada pedaço de chocolate é mais do que um doce: é uma história para ser saboreada.

Name: Kaoxue Chocolates SAS
Description:
Somos una empresa de chocolatería  que se enfoca en conectar a las diferentes generaciones con nuestras tradiciones culturales y gastronómicas. Utilizamos materias primas e insumos nacionales para desarrollar y diseñar productos únicos que destacan nuestra tradición ancestral del chocolate, hecho a mano por mujeres tejedoras de vida. Nuestra visión es ser reconocidos como una empresa que transforma cada bocado de cacao en un chocolate con historia.

En Kaoxue, creemos que el chocolate no es solo un producto, sino una forma de vida. Por esta razón, trabajamos directamente con artesanos chocolateros ubicados en áreas de posconflicto y contratamos mujeres cabeza de hogar, quienes por su experiencia de vida se han convertido en tejedoras de sociedad y para ser artesanas del chocolate se debe ser tejedora de vida. Nuestro compromiso con la sostenibilidad y el comercio justo nos lleva a utilizar materias primas e insumos nacionales, para ofrecer productos de alta calidad y autenticidad, que reflejen la riqueza y la diversidad de la cultura colombiana.

Nuestra visión es ser reconocidos en el año 2027 como una empresa que conecta con la tradición ancestral del chocolate. Queremos transformar cada bocado de cacao en un chocolate con historia, hecho a mano por nuestras artesanas chocolateras. En Kaoxue, valoramos la pasión y el amor por el chocolate, la tradición, el cacao, nuestra tierra, la familia, la vida, la amistad, nuestras tradiciones e historia, y queremos compartir esa pasión con el mundo a través de nuestros productos.

En Kaoxue Chocolates, estamos comprometidos con la calidad, la autenticidad y la tradición. Cada producto que ofrecemos está diseñado para brindar una experiencia única y deliciosa, que resalta la riqueza y la diversidad de la cultura colombiana. Nos esforzamos por ser una empresa sostenible, socialmente responsable y comprometida con el desarrollo de nuestro país y sus comunidades.

En Kaoxue Chocolates, estamos comprometidos con la calidad, la autenticidad y la tradición. Cada producto que ofrecemos está diseñado para brindar una experiencia única y deliciosa, que resalta la riqueza y la diversidad de la cultura colombiana.

Name: Lindy's Cookies
Description:
Lindy’s Cookies was founded in 2016 by Lindy Siefker who started the business out of her home kitchen. Joy began to spread further in 2018 as new team members joined forces with Lindy and operations began to take place out of a commercial kitchen in Carmel, IN.

In 2022, unexpected staffing challenges and Lindy’s battle against breast cancer nearly caused the business to close–opening the door for a different story to unfold.

While volunteering for a church event in the same commercial kitchen the business operated from, Linda Eckel met the women baking for Lindy’s Cookies and learned of its pending closure. Linda, who runs a catering business outside of her home, has a passion for bringing people around the table that runs deep. With a heart bent toward loving on people through food, Linda instantly fell in love with the mission behind Lindy’s Cookies.

Days after meeting Lindy’s Cookie crew, Linda’s family challenged her with an unexpected question: “how are you planning to expand your catering business?” The question prompted Linda to reach out to Lindy to see if taking on the cookie business was meant to be.

The ladies decided there was no time to waste. Lindy and Linda became fast friends as Lindy gracefully imparted her wisdom to Linda who knew she had big shoes to fill as she took ownership of Lindy’s Cookies.

Each alfajor is a masterpiece, expertly handcrafted with a focus on quality, attention to detail, and the rich tradition of Argentine confectionery.

We specialize in embossing our wafer cookies, offering exclusive opportunities for luxury brands to personalize our award-winning confections. Collaborating with us allows brands to delight their customers with exquisite, artisanal treats that reflect their unique identity. Our handcrafted alfajores have earned international recognition, winning prestigious awards twice. I transitioned from a successful marketing career to pursue this venture, demonstrating adaptability and a relentless pursuit of passion. Join us in savouring the essence of Argentina with our artisanal delights at Gennaro's Artisanal Alfajores!

Services Offered:

Are you looking to infuse luxury and artisanal flair into your brand's offerings? At Gennaro's Artisanal Alfajores, we specialize in crafting exquisite alfajores de maicena and offer a range of services to elevate your brand experience:

Custom Artisanal Confections: Collaborate with us to create custom embossed alfajores tailored to your brand's unique identity.  Delight your customers with gourmet treats that leave a lasting impression.

Corporate Gifting Solutions: Impress clients and partners with our gourmet alfajores as part of your corporate gifting strategy.

Brand Collaboration Opportunities: Partner with us to co-create limited-edition alfajores that align with your brand's values and aesthetics and engage your audience with memorable experiences.

Consulting Services: Tap into our expertise for recipe development, small-batch production, & award marketing strategies.

Name: BRAZIL ICUMSA EXPORTERS
Description:
With a rich history and deep-rooted connections in the vibrant landscapes of Brazil, we are dedicated to providing the finest ICUMSA Sugar to businesses worldwide. As leading exporters, we pride ourselves on our commitment to quality, sustainability, and exceptional customer service. Our journey began over two decades ago, and since then, we have established strong partnerships and a solid reputation as a reliable and reputable sugar exporter.

Our Sugar Excellence:

Our sugar is sourced directly from the lush landscapes of Brazil, ensuring unparalleled quality and taste. Our product range includes premium ICUMSA Sugar variants, each tailored to meet specific needs:

- ICUMSA 45 Sugar:  Our flagship product, renowned for its exceptional purity and refined taste. It boasts a maximum polarity of 99.8%, making it ideal for food and beverage production, baking, and confectionery.
- VHP Sugar: Designed for industrial applications, VHP Sugar has a very high polarization of 99.5% or higher, making it a versatile and functional ingredient.
- ICUMSA 600-1200 Sugar: Our unique brown sugar offering adds a rich, pronounced flavor and a warm, darker hue to baked goods and confectionery.
- ICUMSA 100 Sugar: A versatile all-purpose sweetener with slightly lower polarity, perfect for baking, cooking, and beverage production.
- Beet Sugar: A natural sweetening alternative, derived from sugar beets, offering a mild, delicate flavor, and a boost of natural goodness.

Our Commitment to Quality and Sustainability:

We understand that quality and sustainability go hand in hand. That's why we are committed to providing the finest ICUMSA Sugar while also being responsible stewards of the environment. Our sugar is sourced from sustainable and eco-friendly farms in Brazil, ensuring ethical and sustainable practices

Name: Granny's Confections
Description:
When I was growing up, my grandmother used to cook some of the best peanut brittle I had ever eaten.  One day, I asked her to show me how she made it.  She did, but she made me promise to never tell anyone the secret, and I have not told anyone, even today.  As I got older, I made peanut brittle for people at church and birthdays and holidays for people at work.  Overwhelmingly, everyone would tell me how amazing the brittle was and how I should sell it. 

Years went by and the same feedback over and over.  This is the best brittle I have ever had; you should sell it.  So, I decided to open Granny’s Confections and do exactly that.  In 2015 I opened a small 300 square foot location in Hartland Michigan.  After two years of hard work and handmaking every order of brittle, I relocated to a 1,200 square foot location, and then purchased a 1,700 square foot location in Howell Michigan where we have currently have a small store front and hand make very order of our amazing brittle. 

We handmake and hand pack every order of our amazing brittle to ensure the quality.  Granny told me there are three very important rules and we follow them every single day:  1.  Never cut corners.  2.  Use quality ingredients. 3. Put love in everything you do.  We have seven amazing flavors of our handmade brittle including peanut brittle, pecan brittle, cashew brittle, jalapeno peanut brittle, coconut brittle, almond brittle and nutless (no nut) brittle.

Name: Krakowskie Wypieki
Description:
Jesteśmy producentem najwyższej jakości ciast, deserów, makaroników francuskich oraz monoporcji bankietowych. W naszej ofercie znajdziecie Państwo również pozycje bezglutenowe. 


Z radością prezentujemy naszą nowość - kolekcję bankietowych monoporcji, które definiują nowy standard w sztuce cukierniczej.

Eleganckie monoporcje stworzone z myślą o tych, którzy pragną dodać blasku swoim uroczystościom. 

Nasze monoporcje to połączenie doskonałego smaku z niepowtarzalnym designem, które są idealnym dopełnieniem każdej uroczystości, konferencji czy bankietu. 

Nasze produkty przygotowywane są z najwyższą starannością, wykorzystując świeże, lokalne składniki, aby móc zaoferować Państwu najwyższą jakość. 

Oprócz monoporcji, nasze menu obfituje w bogactwo deserów, które zaspokoją każde słodkie pragnienie. Od tradycyjnych ciast po nowoczesne kreacje - mamy coś dla każdego.

Oferujemy również wyjątkowe makaroniki francuskie w 12 smakach. 

Krakowskie Wypieki to miejsce, gdzie każdy szczegół ma znaczenie. Nasze ciastka i desery to nie tylko pokusa dla podniebienia, ale i uczta dla oczu, idealnie komponująca się z każdą okazją.

Zapraszamy do kontaktu i składania zamówień. Pozwólcie, że nasze produkty staną się ozdobą Waszego bankietu, a szeroka oferta deserów zachwyci Waszych gości, tworząc niezapomniane wspomnienia.

Krakowskie Wypieki - Słodkości, które tworzą historię.

Unique flavours.

Located in the heart of vibrant Limassol, Yiamy Studio stands out as a premier location for a wonderful experience. Each indulgence is made right in the studio to highlight the best of Cyprus and international pastry art. Yiamy’s Creative Director and Cake Designer Alina Berezovskaya introduces unique flavours, fresh colours and a dash of daring into her dazzling creations.

“When I think about desserts, I want to create something that is as pleasing to the eye as it is to the taste buds. Unique and refined, originally crafted that is sure to satisfy every tongue”. 
~ Alina Berezovskaya

Name: Choco-Berry
Description:
Vi fremstiller vores produkter med en stor passion og entusiasme!

Vi mener at smag, økologiske ingredienser og fremragende kundeservice betyder noget. Prøv vores økologiske jordbær - Forkæl dig selv eller dem du elsker!

Vi ser frem til at se dig blive din leverandør.

Name: Auserman Chocolate
Description:
Auserman Chocolate is an Ecuadorian-owned, origin-crafted chocolate house dedicated to preserving the true character of Fino de Aroma cacao. We craft our chocolate where cacao is born at origin honoring Ecuador’s heritage with disciplined execution, precise fermentation, and uncompromising standards.

From Ecuador to New York, our mission is simple: elevate real origin flavor and set a new benchmark for modern premium chocolate. We focus on purity, transparency, and craftsmanship chocolate made with intention, not shortcuts.

Auserman Chocolate exists to show what happens when heritage, discipline, and design meet at the source. True cacao. True craft. Made at origin.

Name: BonBon
Description: Десерти приготовані професійними кондитерами не виходячи з дому.  Виробник кондитерської продукції в Україні з 2022 року. Дуже широкий асортимент найрізноманітніших кондитерських виробів: тістеска, печиво, булки і багато інших смаколиків.

Name: Art Dessert Cakes Laboratory
Gumi Yum Surprise
Description:
Gumi Yum Surprise is a confectionery brand with innovation at its core. As a disruptive new brand, we introduce a world-first concept: delicious 3D injection-molded gumi candy wrapped around a surprise egg, each unveiling a collectible toy inside. Created to excite kids and fans alike, Gumi Yum Surprise combines flavor, imaginative play, and collectability —all in one unique treat. 

Gumi Yum Surprise is from the ZURU Group. One of the fastest growing consumer goods companies in the world, ZURU has established brands in 120+ markets worldwide, with a team of 5000+ employees based out of 26 global offices.

Name: Tariq Corporation Limited
Description: Husein sugar mills limited is a company based in of Jaranwala and Head office is based in Lahore, Pakistan. Tariq Corporation Limited , incorporated in 1966, in Karachi is one of Pakistan’s oldest and most renowned sugar factories. Having completed more than fifty years of business, the company is listed on the Pakistan Stock Exchange with security symbol, TCORP. The company has had the honor of being award the Top 25 Companies of Pakistan award twice. Here, on the Web Site, you can see the latest news and updates with regard to the company.

Name: Ingenio del Occidente S.A.S.
Description: Ingenio del Occidente S.A.S somos una empresa agroindustrial que se dedica a cultivar, elaborar, y comercializar de manera responsable productos derivados de la caña de azúcar de alta calidad, siendo una empresa que se ha convertido en una fuente de empleo para cientos de habitantes de los municipios aledaños, ayudando en el desarrollo y el progreso de la región. Somos un grupo de trabajo que mediante nuestra sinergia, nuestra unión y principalmente nuestras habilidades sentaran las bases para lograr la visión que nos hemos propuesto alcanzar. Para garantizar nuestro éxito en un futuro y lograr todos los objetivos y metas, creemos que tener una cultura estratégica y de negocios nos permitirán generar un desarrollo responsable.

Name: Zotter Schokolade
Description:
Zotter zählt zu den besten Schokoladenherstellern der Welt und ist eines der nachhaltigsten Unternehmen Österreichs. Über 500 unterschiedliche Schokoladen, handgeschöpfte Schokoladen mit verführerischen Füllungen, pure Single Origin Schokoladen, Dekor und Kuvertüre zum Backen, handgemachte Pralinen, individuelle Schokolade u.v.m.

100% BIO + FAIR + BEAN-to-BAR – Wir produzieren von der Kakaobohne bis zur Tafel und verwenden ausschließlich Zutaten in Bio- und Fair-Qualität.

Wir freuen uns über neue Fachhändler*innen und bieten Zotter Schokolade für Gastronomie und als individuell gestaltete Firmenschokolade mit Ihrem Design an.

Name: Usina São José do Pinheiro LTDA.
Description: Localizada no Município de Laranjeiras Estado de Sergipe a Usina São José do Pinheiro, é uma empresa secular que presta um excelente serviço na comercialização e fabricação de açúcar, álcool, melaço e geração de energia para todo o Nordeste Brasileiro e alguns países europeus e africanos.

Name: Boella & Sorrisi srl
Description:
Boella & Sorrisi è un’azienda artigianale a conduzione familiare con sede in Piemonte, specializzata nella produzione di cioccolato e prodotti da forno. 
I prodotti si distinguono per la qualità elevata, la sostenibilità e la produzione secondo ricette tradizionali con processi innovativi e certificati.

Name: Lang's Chocolates
Description:
Centered on family and based on strong core values, ours is a family business spanning generations. We work together handcrafting the finest chocolate confections and have pride in the quality of our chocolates and our unparalled commitment to service for our customers around the world. Our customers are special to us.

We make our chocolates in small batches, almost made to order. Our chocolates are also Kosher Certified. Our 73% cocoa premium Belgian dark chocolate is dairy free and most of our products made with dark chocolate contain no dairy.

Name: Kervan USA
Description:
Kervan USA is a wholly owned subsidiary of Kervan Gida, the most significant supplier and producer of gummies, which is quickly advancing into the world market with its Bebeto brand.

Kervan Gida has aimed to become one of the three most important candy companies in the world and in Turkey with its skilled management, innovative research and development work, modern understanding of production, environmental policies and modern communication technologies which suit the current and ever-changing consumer demand.

Name: La Shop à Bonbons
Description:
Une entreprise Québécoise innovante propose à sa clientèle plus de 500 choix de bonbons et de chocolats, une sélection variée incluant d'intéressantes nouveautés provenant d’Europe, des États-Unis et du 
Canada et offre la livraison partout au Québec.

Name: Adikam Chocolate
Description:
ADIKAM to polski producent wyrobów czekoladowych, który przekształcił pasję do czekolady w sztukę tworzenia niezapomnianych smaków. Oferta ADIKAM to nie tylko czekolada - to doświadczenie, które pobudza zmysły i dostarcza niepowtarzalnych wrażeń smakowych. Produkty, które tworzymy, od atrakcyjnych kształtów figurek i lizaków czekoladowych po czekoladę z owocami liofilizowanymi, są wynikiem największej staranności i dbałości o szczegóły. Każdy kawałek czekolady ADIKAM to dowód na zaangażowanie w dostarczanie najwyższej jakości produktów.

Jesteśmy dumni z zaangażowania w zrównoważony rozwój i odpowiedzialność społeczną. Produkty ADIKAM nie zawierają szkodliwego oleju palmowego, a kakao pochodzi z kontrolowanych upraw, co potwierdza certyfikat Rainforest Alliance.

W ADIKAM, każdy klient jest dla nas ważny. Dlatego jesteśmy otwarci na produkcję w ramach marki własnej i mamy duże doświadczenie w tej dziedzinie.

Dołącz do podróży po świecie czekolady i odkryj smak, który przekracza oczekiwania. Odkryj ADIKAM - czekoladę, która zmienia zasady gry.

Name: SW Sugar Mills
Description:
We craft the essence of sweetness from nature's finest sources. With cutting-edge technology and stringent quality control, we produce a wide range of premium sugar products. 
Committed to sustainability, we prioritize eco-friendly practices throughout our production process, ensuring a delightful taste that is both responsible and irresistible. Join us on this journey to sweeten lives and uplift communities with our wholesome and ethically sourced sugar solutions.

Name: Regal Food Industries
Description: The Regal food industries under the brand name of Lazer is cementing a quality reputation in the hearts of Pakistani people since 1990. The Lazer is one of the most favorite candy brand which contains healthy multivitamins. Through the delicious taste of candies every child has charismatic and glowing memories with Lazer candies as they are growing up.

Name: TAT GLOBAL GIDA SANAYİ A.Ş.
Description:
TAT GLOBAL GIDA SANAYİ ANONİM ŞİRKETİ uzun yıllardır Tarihi İpek Yolu üzerinde Gaziantep merkezli olarak faaliyet sürdürmektedir. Gelenekten geleceğe İpek Yolu lezzetlerinin kökenine şöyle değinecek olursak; Gaziantep ve Halep’in stratejik konum ve bünyesinde bulundurduğu farklı medeniyetlerin izleri sebebiyle çeşitli kültürel zenginliklere sahip kadim iki beldedir. Engin bir kültür ve ticaret merkezi olma vasfını her daim muhafaza eden bu iki belde, bugün de her alanda katma değer üreten şehirlerin başında gelmektedir. İşte bu derin kültürleri barındıran topraklardan hem egzotik hem de her damağa hitap eden bir lezzet çıkardık.

Bu enfes lezzetin ülkemizde ve ülkemiz dışında büyük kitlelerce keşfedilmesini hedefliyoruz. Bu saf ve katışıksız lezzetin doğru yansımasını sağlayarak 7’den 70’e tüm kitlelere ulaştırma misyonunu üslenmekteyiz. Bu doğrultuda TAT GLOBAL GIDA SANAYİ ANONİM ŞİRKETİ olarak Tüm Dünya ülkelerine ve Türkiye’nin bütün illerine İpek Yolu Lezzetleri hususunda hizmet sunmaktayız. 

Ürünlerimizin tamamı bünyemizde bulunan mühendislerin “AR-GE” çalışmaları sonucunda ortaya çıkmıştır. İpek Yolu Lezzetlerinin oluşturulmasında %100 doğal ürünler ile Çin’den Yemen’e uzanan İpekyolu’nun kültürünü ve Dedemiz KEMAL AĞA’dan gelen lezzet mirasını sizlere sunmaktayız. 

1957 Yılında kapalı çarşı lokum imalatına başladı 

TAT GLOBAL GIDA gerek tedarikçileri ve gerekse müşterileriyle uzun dönemli ilişkiler doğrultusunda, ulusal ve uluslararası alanlarda hizmet veren, müşterilerinin taleplerini karşılayan, yatırımlarla sürekli gelişen ve büyüyen bir firmadır. TAT GLOBAL GIDA; koşulsuz müşteri memnuniyeti, sürekli gelişme, değişen müşteri ihtiyaçlarının karşılanması, yüksek kalitede ürün ve hizmet sunmayı hedef alan güçlü bir takımdır. 

TAT GLOBAL GIDA gerek tedarikçileri ve gerekse müşterileriyle uzun dönemli ilişkiler doğrultusunda, ulusal ve uluslararası alanlarda hizmet veren, müşterilerinin taleplerini karşılayan, yatırımlarla sürekli gelişen bir firma.

Name: Exploded Sweets
Description: Exploded Sweets is one of the UK's premier producers of freeze-dried confectionary. We supply to both wholesale and retail markets throughout the UK and take pride in our high standards of quality and value for money.

Name: VOBRO
Description:
VOBRO IS A SWEETS MANUFACTURER WITH OVER 35 YEARS EXPERIENCE IN THE CONFECTIONERY INDUSTRY
VOBRO was founded in 1986:
•	Headquarter and factory are located in Brodnica city, Kuyavian-Pomerian.
•	Since the beginning, the company is entirely based on Polish capital. 
•	Around 400 employees are dedicated to development of the company. Majority of them with long-standing apprenticeship, attached to VOBRO for many years.

VOBRO MEETS THE HIGHEST QUALITY STANDARD SET BY IFS AND BRC

PRODUCTION POSSIBILITIES:
Production possibilities of our production plant let possibilities to further development in distribution of brand products and brands dedicated specially for our clients
Production possibilities per 1 year: 
•	Pralines production line: 6 900 tonnes
•	Chocolate sweets production line: 6 100 tonnes
•	Jellies production line: 3 050 tonnes

WE ARE FAMOUS FROM THE CHOCOLATE PRODUCTS INLUDED CHOCOLATE PRALINES
•	Manufacturer of an iconic FRUTTI DI MARE brand and famous plain chocolate pralines filled with cherries in liqueur: CHERRY PASSION and LOVE & CHERRY.
•	Big part of company products are chocolate sweets and chocolate bars - included very popular TRUFFLE and JAMAJKA.
•	For the few years company investing also in different kinds of sweets: jellies - new brand JELLY DOT and line of bars

Name: Økoladen & Elmelund Chocolatier Organic
Description:
Økoladen er en chokolade producent der ejes og drives af Jan & Amanda Elmelund. 

Vi er en lille chokoladefabrik, hvis vision er at fremstille de bedst tænkelige chokoladeprodukter. 

 Vi har valgt, at fremstille økologisk chokolade, fordi det er den rene vare. 

 Vi har også valgt at fremstille vores chokolade i hånden, dels fordi det giver os en bedre føling med råvarerne - og dels fordi det giver os en spændende og kreativ arbejdsdag, hvor det ikke kun drejer sig om, at stå ved et samlebånd og pakke produkter, der er spyttet ud af en maskine. 

 Vi håber, at du kan smage den glæde og entusiasme, vi lægger i vores arbejde og resultatet af det. 

 Med Venlig Hilsen
 Jan Elmelund & Amanda Elmelund
 Holdet bag Økoladen & Elmelund Chocolatier Organic

Name: BonBon - A Swedish Candy Co.
Description: Founded in 2017 by three Swedish friends, Selim Adira, Robert Persson, and Leonard Schaltz, BonBon has revolutionized American candy culture with their authentic Swedish candies and delicacies. BonBon imports 100% of its exquisite confections, including hundreds of pick-and-mix candies and private label Sour Fish and Salty Licorice Twists creations. With five retail locations in New York City and Brooklyn, and a growing e-commerce business shipping nationwide, BonBon is dedicated to sharing the joy of Swedish sweets with candy lovers everywhere.

Name: Coronet Foods Pvt Ltd
Description: Coronet Foods is a biscuit manufacturing company established in 2002. With our state-of-the-art factory, we produce a wide range of biscuits that cater to various tastes and preferences. Our commitment to excellence, innovation, and customer satisfaction sets us apart in the market. We strive to deliver exceptional flavors, textures, and nutritional value in every biscuit we create. Our dedicated team of skilled professionals ensures strict adherence to quality standards throughout the manufacturing process. Our key businesses are in the snacking category, and we have our footprint established in the African continent and the GCC countries where our products are relished by people of all age groups.  We take pride in providing delightful treats that bring joy to consumers of all ages and are hoping to reach many around the world.

Name: Kagera Sugar Limited
Description:
Founded in 1973, Kagera Sugar Limited stands as a cornerstone of the Tanzanian sugar industry. As the third-largest sugar manufacturer in the country, we pride ourselves on our rich heritage and unwavering commitment to quality. Our expansive operations span over 20,300 hectares of prime sugarcane farmland, meticulously cultivated to produce the finest sugar. This dedication to excellence allows us to contribute significantly to Tanzania's economy and meet the growing demand for high-quality sugar products.

At Kagera Sugar Limited, our mission goes beyond production. We are deeply invested in sustainable agricultural practices and community development. By integrating modern techniques with traditional knowledge, we ensure our operations are environmentally responsible and socially beneficial. Our team of skilled professionals works tirelessly to achieve an annual production of over 200,000 tonnes of sugar, driving innovation and maintaining our reputation as a leader in the industry. Join us on our journey towards a sweeter future for Tanzania and beyond.

Name: Nelly Gıda ve Tarım
Description: 100% real candied fruit. Gluten free and vegan.

Name: Amaretti Virginia - Creazioni dolciarie dal 1860
Description:
Established in 1860 in Sassello, Liguria, Amaretti Virginia is a historic brand and one of Italy's most renowned cookie producers. The Virginia brand is synonymous with quality and elegance, crafting unparalleled pastries and confections.

Its global recognition dates back to the late 1800s when the production of soft "Amaretti cookies" gained momentum. The bakery in Sassello, producing these exquisite Amaretti cookies, became a gathering place for locals and tourists, depicted on postcards as "Piazza degli Amaretti Virginia."

The distinctive scent of apricot-almond quickly became the hallmark of these pastries. The introduction of Amaretti Virginia at major international exhibitions such as Arcachon 1897, Turin 1898, and Genoa 1903 further fueled the popularity of Amaretti Virginia cookies.

For 150 years, Virginia has made quality its business philosophy, continuing to be a symbol of exquisite pastries and confections. Experience a taste of history and elegance with every bite of Amaretti Virginia!

Name: Gobind Sugar Mill – Aira
Description: The Sugar, Power & Ethanol (SPE Division of Zuari Industries Limited) runs a state-of-the-art integrated facility at Gobind Sugar Mills, Aira, Uttar Pradesh. With 10,000 TCD crushing, 40 MW cogeneration, and 125 KLPD ethanol production, we deliver premium Zuari sugar products to domestic and global markets. Partnering with 60,000+ farmers across 60,000 hectares, we champion sustainable agriculture and rural empowerment. Committed to innovation, compliance, and quality, the division is building a future-ready, globally competitive sugarcane ecosystem.

Name: Zakłady Przemysłu Cukierniczego "SKAWA" S.A.
Description:
Skawa to renomowany polski producent słodyczy z wieloletnią tradycją, który od 100 lat dostarcza konsumentom wyjątkowe produkty o niezapomnianym smaku. Nasze flagowe wyroby, takie jak kultowe Draże Korsarze i Marynarze, delikatne wafelki Elitesse 20g i Trójkąty 23g, aromatyczne pierniczki Baśniowe oraz klasyczne herbatniki, cieszą się uznaniem zarówno na rynku krajowym, jak i zagranicznym.

Skawa to nie tylko produkty – to ludzie, którzy z pasją tworzą słodycze najwyższej jakości, oraz pokolenia konsumentów, dla których nasze wyroby stały się częścią codziennych chwil i rodzinnych tradycji. Łączymy sprawdzone receptury z nowoczesnymi rozwiązaniami, dbając o smak, jakość i niepowtarzalny charakter naszych słodyczy.

Jesteśmy dumni z naszej historii, ale patrzymy w przyszłość, nieustannie poszukując nowych inspiracji i możliwości rozwoju. Skawa to historia smaku, którą tworzymy razem – od pokoleń i na pokolenia.

Zapraszamy do śledzenia naszego profilu na LinkedIn i odkrywania świata słodkich przyjemności!

Name: QAND
Description:
Qand is a cultural masterpiece that combines the finest dry fruits and nuts from Uzbekistan's vibrant bazaar with premium chocolate from Belgium's best chocolatiers. Skilled artisans bring these ingredients together with care, love, and dedication towards each unique creation. Qand.
Selected with experience. Produced with love.

Name: PT Industri Gula Glenmore
Description:
PT Industri Gula Glenmore (PT IGG), merupakan Anak Perusahaan yang sahamnya dimiliki oleh PT Perkebunan Nusantara XII (Persero) 99,5%   dan  PT Perkebunan Nusantara XI (Persero) 0,5%, dibentuk berdasarkan Surat Menteri BUMN No. S-684/MBU/2012, tanggal 28 Nopember 2012, dan No. S - 491/MBU/2013, tanggal 31 Juli 2013, yang dituangkan dalam Akte Notaris Aryanti Artisari, SH.MKn., Nomor 07,  tanggal 3 Desember 2012, disahkan dengan Surat Keputusan Menteri Hukum dan HAM Nomor AHU-00727.AH.01.01. Tahun 2013., tanggal  4 Januari 2013, dan terakhir diubah  dengan  Akte Notaris Nur Muhammad Dipo Nusantara Pua Upa, SH.,M.Kn. Nomor 06, tanggal 19 Agustus 2013 dikukuhkan dengan Surat Menteri Hukum dan HAM dengan Nomor AHU-0081568.AH.01.09 Tahun 2013, tanggal 29 Agustus 2013.
Tugas  utama PT IGG adalah melaksanakan pembangunan dan pengelolaan Pabrik Gula Terpadu Glenmore berkapasitas 6.000 TCD (expandible 8.000 TCD) di atas sebagian lahan PT Perkebunan Nusantara XII (Persero) seluas 102,4 Ha yang di-inbreng-kan kepada PT IGG berlokasi di Desa Karang Harjo, Kecamatan Glenmore, Kabupaten Banyuwangi.
Bahan baku tebu akan dipasok sepenuhnya oleh Kebun-kebun penanam tebu PT Perkebunan Nusantara XII (Persero) yang ada di wilayah Kabupaten Banyuwangi. Dari pabrik gula terpadu ini akan diproduksi gula putih premium,  daya listrik,  bio-ethanol,  pupuk organik  dan pakan ternak.

Name: Cristalco Ibérica
Description:
Somos una compañía del grupo CRISTAL UNION, uno de los principales actores agroindustriales de Europa, y líder en los mercados de azúcar, alcohol y bioetanol. Comercializamos azúcar de remolacha y caña, alcohol etílico de remolacha y trigo, bioetanol convencional y avanzado e ingredientes de la planta de stevia. 

Estamos presentes en más de 80 países, y nuestra facturación global supera los 2.200 millones de euros. 
Todo ello con el máximo respeto medioambiental y social. 
En Cristalco Ibérica, creemos en el progreso continuo, y trabajamos cada día para ofrecer más calidad, mayor eficiencia, sostenibilidad y soluciones adaptadas a las nuevas demandas del mercado. Todo ello con un profundo respeto por la naturaleza y por las personas que hacen posible nuestra actividad.

Name: Lucky You
Description:
Lucky You! creates employee appreciation programs and incentives gifts in San Diego, CA that have been shipping across the United States and Canada for over 20 years.

Our specialty is large scale fulfillment of branded gifts that look as though they came directly from our clients’ corporate offices. With our onsite bakery and chocolate confection line, gifts are customizable right down to the sweets inside. 

We value integrity, ingenuity and kindness and are proud to have been supporting animal shelters across the United States since 2005.  Please see our website to learn more!  Lucky You is a woman-owned business that supports our local chapter of the Boys and Girls Club of San Diego and invests in solar energy to operate our manufacturing equipment.

For a better understanding of our product offerings and to view a portfolio of our best work, we invite you to visit our website.

Name: NATUREL SEKERLEME
Description: Roshen'in Türkiye'deki tek yetkili distribütörü. (Naturel Şekerleme)

Name: Mushy's Sweets
Description:
We specialise in catering for all your Halal Jelly, and gummy sweets.
Nationwide delivery available. Free collection from M16 Manchester
Instagram-mushyssweets

Name: Chr. Storz GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Storz - Take it happy.

Chr. Storz GmbH & Co. KG is a producer of premium solid milk chocolate and praline specialties made in Germany since 1884. Chr. Storz delivers wholesalers, speciality stores, retail-chains, C&C-markets, catering, promotional market, hotels, department stores, etc. in more than 40 countries around the world. The small solid chocolate pieces range from traditional to modern. The whole product sortiment is Fairtrade or UTZ certified.

Name: Pimlico Confectioners Ltd
Description:
Established in 2010, Pimlico Confectioners is a private-owned business with 20 years of experience in the confectionery sector. We specialise in the creation of gummy sweets, sweet liquorice and luxury handmade chocolate products. We own soft candy brands Pimlico and luxury chocolate brand Keats Chocolatier. We have offices in the UK and Turkey. Our UK Head Office distributes a wide variety of confectionery to retailers and conveniences stores across the country including Tesco, Morrisons and many more. We’re one of the fastest-growing, most innovative confectionery manufacturers in the UK and we’re still growing!

We specialise in:
•	Gum confectionery
•	Jelly confectionery
•	Sugar Confectionery
•	Boiled sweets and lollipops

Our premium quality ranges include:
•	Natural Flavours & Colours
•	Vegetarian & Vegan
•	Gelatine Free


We are currently selling our ranges to many well-known retailers such as Tesco, Asda, Morrisons and many other independent stores.

Name: Cacau do Céu
Description: Cacau do Céu é uma empresa apaixonada por chocolates finos, estabelecida em Ilhéus, Bahia, em 2011. Inspirados pela rica herança do cacau na região, nos dedicamos a criar deliciosas obras de arte com os melhores ingredientes locais. Nossos produtos são elaborados com cuidado artesanal, garantindo qualidade e sabor excepcionais em cada mordida. Desde as clássicas barras de chocolate até os mais requintados bombons e trufas, cada item da Cacau do Céu é uma celebração do cacau baiano, proporcionando uma experiência celestial aos nossos clientes.

Name: Selectum GmbH
Description:
We love snacks! 
And we are convinced that humanity deserves better and more creative snacks.

We aim to support various companies in introducing new product categories to the market.

Our new ideas, concepts, and expertise lie in snack production, and we want to bring our customers' dream products to life.

Name: Cahua GmbH
Description:
Bean-to-Bar Schokolade. Handwerk in Deutschland. Kein Gedöns.

CAHUA ist eine handwerkliche Bean-to-Bar-Schokoladenmanufaktur aus Koblenz. Wir verarbeiten Kakaobohnen von Kooperativen weltweit - von der Bohne bis zur fertigen Tafel, in unserer eigenen Produktion.

Jede unserer Schokoladen erzählt die Geschichte ihres Ursprungs: von fruchtigen Noten über florale, bis hin zu Erdig intensiv. Aber auch der Menschen hinter dem Produkt.

Name: Centrosucar
Description:
A maior distribuidora de açúcares líquidos, açúcares invertidos e xarope de caramelo do Brasil!

Com mais de 10 anos de experiência, a CentroSucar é referência no fornecimento de açúcares líquidos refinados, açúcares líquidos invertidos e xaropes de caramelo natural, atendendo indústrias dos mais diversos segmentos, como alimentício, farmacêutico e químico.

Nossa estrutura de produção, com capacidade de 20 mil toneladas por mês, aliada a uma logística ágil, permite entregas em até 72 horas úteis dentro de um raio de 300 km da fábrica, sem custo adicional de frete.

Nosso compromisso com a qualidade e segurança alimentar é certificado por normas internacionais como FSSC 22.000, Halal e Kosher, garantindo produtos confiáveis e eficientes para processos industriais.

Mais do que um fornecedor, somos um parceiro estratégico para impulsionar a eficiência e a inovação na sua produção.

 Entre em contato para saber como podemos atender às necessidades da sua empresa.

Name: Wild West Chocolate
Description:
We are Wild West Chocolate, and we were born out of pure, unbridled passion for good food that does good in return. We are among the few flavor-seeking pioneers who dare to forge a new path forward for sweet lovers everywhere. Lucky for all of us, our particular path is lined with luscious organic chocolate with no sugar added.

Wild West Chocolate is a brand rooted in the spirit of the American West. Our team is made up of honest, hardworking people who have built lives here and believe in the power of our natural surroundings. That’s what inspired us to explore a new frontier of chocolate by harkening back to simpler times: when clean, organic ingredients were the only kind. No added sugar. No sugar alcohols. Just real, irresistible food you can indulge in without thinking twice. All Wild West Chocolate Bars and Bear Claws are sweetened only with fruit. And not just any fruit: the finest certified organic, non-GMO fruit on the planet. Our master chocolatiers use an exclusive blend of premium sun-ripened organic dates, mulberries, peaches and mangos to bring the perfect touch of sweetness to our artisanal chocolates without a single grain of refined sugar.

At Wild West Chocolate, we have an untamed hunger for the sweetest things in life. That includes chocolate, of course. And basically everything that come from the earth, including water.

We respect the role of rivers, lakes and streams as the lifeblood of nature and an essential element of clean, plant-based ingredients like the ones in our chocolate. That’s why we donate a portion of profit from every sale to the River Management Society to help support the passionate people who protect North America’s wild waters.

Name: lil sweet treat
Description:
lil sweet treat is a distinctive candy concept that sources and develops premium confections from Spain, Sweden, Germany, Belgium, and other regions globally. 

The company currently operates seven retail locations across NYC, Philadelphia, Boston, and Georgetown D.C., offering refined spaces for customers to explore exceptional sweets from around the world. Through a nationwide ecommerce presence and a bespoke events division, lil sweet treat delivers thoughtfully crafted candy experiences to individuals, brands, and special occasions nationwide.

Name: Windel Group GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Die Windel Group vereint als familiengeführte Holding verschiedene Unternehmen der Nahrungsmittelbranche unter einem Dach. Ob Schokolade, Kaffee oder süße Präsente: Gemeinsam bringen wir Freude, Genuss und Vielfalt ins Leben. Mehr als 600 Menschen engagieren sich innerhalb der Windel Group für dieses Ziel und arbeiten an hochwertigen Produkten, kreativen Ideen und leistungsstarkem Service und Vertrieb.

An langfristiger Zusammenarbeit orientiert, bauen wir die Gruppe weiter aus und ergänzen sie um Menschen und Unternehmen, die zu unserer Unternehmensmission passen. Denn wir bei der Windel Group finden: Freude, Genuss und Vielfalt kann es gar nicht genug geben in unserem Leben!

Name: Delta Sugar Company
Description:
شركة الدلتا للسكر هي إحدى الشركات الرائدة في مصر والشرق الأوسط في إنتاج السكر من بنجر السكر. تأسست الشركة عام 1978 وتعمل منذ ذلك الحين على تحقيق الاكتفاء الذاتي من السكر في مصر من خلال توفير منتجات ذات جودة عالية ومعايير عالمية.
تبلغ الطاقة الإنتاجية للشركة حوالي 300 ألف طن سنويًا، وتنتج أيضًا منتجات ثانوية مثل المولاس وتفل البنجر، مما يساهم في دعم القطاعات الصناعية المختلفة.
تفخر شركة الدلتا للسكر بالتزامها بالاستدامة وحماية البيئة، حيث حصلت على العديد من شهادات الجودة والتميز في هذا المجال.
يقع المقر الرئيسي للشركة في مدينة 6 أكتوبر، وتواصل الشركة تطوير عملياتها ومنتجاتها لتلبية احتياجات السوق المحلي والدولي.

Delta Sugar Company is a leading producer of sugar from sugar beets in Egypt and the Middle East. Established in 1978, the company has been dedicated to achieving self-sufficiency in sugar production in Egypt by providing high-quality products that meet global standards.
With an annual production capacity of approximately 300,000 tons, Delta Sugar also produces by-products such as molasses and beet pulp, supporting various industrial sectors.
The company takes pride in its commitment to sustainability and environmental protection, earning multiple quality certifications and accolades in the process.
Headquartered in 6th of October City, Delta Sugar continues to enhance its operations and products to meet the demands of both local and international markets.

Name: Paras Candies
Description:
We’re Pittsburgh natives.  

We’re fourth generation Greek Americans. In 1921, John Paraskevas immigrated from Greece to Pittsburgh.  He worked as a baker and chocolatier at the Manos Baking Company.  Fast forward to 1968.  After mentoring under Betsy Ann Helsel, Harry and Catherine Paras purchased Betsy Ann Chocolate which is owned by the Paras family to this day, over 55 years later.  

Paras Candies is something entirely new.  It combines the rich history of our family as chocolatiers and a passion for modern confections.  With quality and taste as our guiding principles, we are carrying the Paras family’s tradition of chocolate making forward for the next 50 years.

Our confections include Turtles Toffees, Caramels and Peanut Butter Patties.  Our chocolates along with our signature hinged box Bridgewater Chocolate makes the perfect gift for all occasions.  Bridgewater Chocolate, MAKE AN IMPRESSION.

Name: Brain Blasterz
Description:
Brain Blasterz launched in 2011 to change the sour candy game. 

Brain Blasterz can meet all your sour needs. All products have a sour scale of 1 to 5 on them, so whether you want something to eat regularly with a slight tang (or a 1 on the scale), to be a bit more brave (a 3 on the scale) or go straight in at the most hardcore sour (a 5 on the scale). We're not only a sour candy brand, we're a sour candy brand with a difference. We have always been about inclusivity and we want everyone to be able to have fun with our candy which is why we've made sure every single one of our products is certified Halal and Vegan.

We don't just stop with our products either - check us out on TikTok (@BrainBlasterzOfficial) and Instagram/Facebook (@BrainBlasterz) for exciting content, giveaways, recipes and much more.

Name: Favorite Food Company
Description:
About Us — Favorite Food Company

At Favorite, we’re all about combining two of the best things in the world — TOYS  and CANDY!  

Established in 2011, we’ve been bringing creative fun to kids through unique products that let them enjoy the sweetness of candy while sparking their imagination.

Our mantra is simple: “Better Quality, Promote Development & Increase the Fun”. We're passionate about supporting the MAKE IN INDIA movement , so we focus on innovation by creating "FIRST TIME IN INDIA" products that stand out in the market . 

Whether it’s lollipops , sweet saunf, chocolate beans , or fun toys , we aim to bring joy in the most exciting ways possible.

We’ve been lucky to earn recognition, including the “Best Quality Candy Toy Manufacturer of the Year”  and “Most Innovative Confectionery Product of the Year”  awards.

but what really keeps us going is seeing the smiles  we put on kids' faces.

As pioneers in the toy-candy space, we’re proud to be part of the next generation of products that keep Indian kids both entertained and satisfied!

Description:
"Welcome to Azesa Chocolates!

We craft exquisite chocolates that delight the senses and foster meaningful connections. Our passion is to create treats that become a part of your special moments and relationships.

- Indulge in our signature chocolates, perfect for personal treats and gifting
- Customize your chocolates for special occasions, events, and corporate gifts
- Experience the art of chocolate-making with our expert team

Let's connect and share the joy of chocolate!"

Name: Stockley's
Description:
Established in 1918 by Malcolm Stockley in the heart of Lancashire on his return from the First World War. From very humble beginnings, Stockley’s has developed a reputation for the finest quality confectionery. 

We take pride in preserving time-honoured traditions – with small batch, hand-crafted methods combined with specially selected ingredients to create the ultimate selection of classic British confectionery. From the nostalgia of hard-boiled sweet shop favourites, to rich buttery fudges and an array of indulgent treats using the finest chocolate.  

In addition to our own Stockley's branded ranges, we are also proud to work with Retailers and Brands on bespoke development briefs from our BRC accredited production facilities. 

Never ones to rest on our laurels, we are constantly looking to develop our range to meet changing customer requirements and are now one of the foremost producers of Sugar-Free, Dairy-Free and Gluten-Free confectionery in the UK.

Name: Simbhaoli Sugars Ltd
Description: Starting in 1933 as a sugar mill in Simbhaoli, UP, established by the honourable founder of the Group Sh. Sardar Raghbir Singh Sandhanwalia, CIE (1946), OBE (1918), the Simbhaoli Group is now a diversified farm-to-consumer Agri-Business and FMCG company with leading consumer brands in categories such as staples, food, beverages, home and personal care, and agri-inputs. Armed with a rich legacy from the pre-Independence era, grounded in its strong ties to lakhs of farmers and rural families, the Simbhaoli Group is committed to continue to build world-class consumer products from the inputs provided by the farmers of India.

Description:

But visible simplicity is a long and complex process of selection the right ingredients, shapes, and flavors. It hides the search for the ideal. We make the fair confectionery, developing our products. And we do this with the main goal of reducing the distance between our brands and consumers. Yes, these are sophisticated products, but we want to make them clear, simple, and close. To bring you joy.


Wellar Group 
Perfect. With no exceptions

Sweetsoul Candy Company combines three generations of candy-making expertise with state-of-the-art confectionery technology to create the highest quality Chocolate in the industry. 

We established Sweetsoul Candy Company to take our family tradition to a new level and make our superior products available for private label and contract manufacturing.

Taste will always be the most important factor in candy making. At Sweetsoul, we make applause-worthy candies, caramels, and chocolates that artfully combine our legendary family recipes with inventive modern ingredients. 
Our confections are made with Non-GMO verified cane sugar, we also offer many all-natural and organic recipes. 

Our facilities comply with all food safety standards and certifications.

With the best quality, our company meets the highest demands and gives people in Germany, Europe and around the world moments of great pleasure with its diverse range.

Description: We are Wicklein – Nuremberg's oldest gingerbread manufacturer. For over 400 years, we have celebrated the art of traditional baking craftsmanship. Our exquisite specialties are distinguished by the finest quality ingredients and the utmost care in preparation and original taste for which we are known worldwide. Proudly, we preserve our inherited recipes like treasures while simultaneously developing extravagant flavor creations each year, hand in hand with our 400-year-old baking expertise.

Name: Doti - Family-Owned Chocolate Factory
Description:
Doti is a Family owned Chocolate Factory from Poland specializing in the production of fruits and nuts in chocolate. Our Premium Chocolates are known for their excellent taste, wide range and attention to detail. 

Doti Chocolates are handmade in copper drums with the use of over 100 years old technology. They have clean and short labels and the chocolate is palm oil free. The chocolates are produced according to the latest food trends and based on a careful selection of ingredients. 

Due to exceptional and unique flavors and the gift character of packaging Doti Chocolates are a perfect idea for a business gift, an addition to the gift basket or a stylish present. 

Chocolates from Doti Family Owned Chocolates Factory: 
• Over 30 years of experience in manufacturing chocolate delicacies
• Wide range of assortment - over 40 unique flavors
• International and national awards (Europe on the Plate, Superior Taste Award, Great Taste Award, Poznaj Dobrą Żywność) 
• Handmade production with BRC, BIO and Gluten-free certificates
• Sold in over 20 countries worldwide

Target markets: specialty stores; gourmet, independent specialty food retailers; organic shops; gift stores; prestigious chain stores and tea/coffee and wine shops

Doti chocolates have the power to spice up relationships. Feel the power of Doti Chocolates!

With a passion for creating innovative and mouth-watering confectioneries, the company has become a household name across the country. It takes pride in offering a diverse range of traditional and contemporary sweets made with the finest ingredients, catering to the taste preferences of its valued customers. The company has a strong commitment to quality, hygiene, and customer satisfaction, ensuring that each bite of its products is an indulgent experience. Whether it's a celebration or a simple craving, Happy Sugar Private Limited has something for everyone to enjoy…..

Name: Haus of CACAO
Description: Cacao Atlanta Chocolate Company was founded in 2004 and specializes in the production and sale of exquisite single-origin chocolate and confections.The company—and its chocolate bars and truffles—are unique in several ways. In the increasingly crowded “artisan chocolate” market, Cacao Atlanta founder Kristen Hard personally scours the tropical regions where the world’s finest cacao beans grow. She aligns with cacao farmers who also believe that chocolate starts with an extraordinary raw product cultivated with care. Cacao Atlanta uses its pure, small-batch, made-from-scratch chocolate in every one of its handmade bars, truffles, and other confections—a rarity in the industry. Hard draws on her Southern heritage as well as her world travels for pairing spices, fruits, and liqueurs that complement the extraordinary chocolates. Cacao Atlanta also partners with scientists, local growers, and likeminded chocolatiers nationally and internationally to advance excellence in the chocolate field.

Name: William Santus & Co Ltd (Uncle Joes)
Description:
William Santus & Co. Ltd are a traditional fourth generation family business specializing in the manufacture and wholesale of confectionery since 1898.  Uncle Joe’s is now the umbrella brand for hundreds of products supplied worldwide.

Still produced in the same traditional manner since 1898, Uncle Joe’s Mint Balls, which is the company’s most popular product, is now recognised worldwide.  The family continue to ensure that the three natural ingredients, which are hand cooked on open gas fires, continue to epitomise the quality of a sweet from the nineteenth century.  

Whilst our ‘handmade manufacturing processes’ remain unchanged since 1898, our packaging formats have developed which allows us to be much more versatile to different markets / consumer wants and needs. We also have the capability of printing directly onto packaging in different languages and nutritional formats.

We remain committed to ‘Making Sweets to Make Life Sweeter Since 1898’ and we now also service markets such as Vegan, Coeliac and Sugar Free along with a range of traditional Favourites, Lozenges, Seasonal and Gifting.

With help from staff members, and support from customers both old and new, Uncle Joe’s remain committed to ‘Making Sweets to Make Life Sweeter Since 1898’

Name: Pasticceria Campidoglio
Description:
La gelateria e graniteria nasce a Sant’ Agata di Militello in Sicilia nel 1930. Il fondatore Sig. Rosario Calanni Billa avvia la produzione e vendita sia in negozio che per le vie cittadine, tramite un triciclo refrigerato, due gusti di gelato, limone e cioccolato, e la granita al limone.

I coniugi Rosario Calanni Billa jr. e Agostina Rosella, seguendo la tradizione del papà Sig. Rosario, fondano il Bar Gelateria e Pasticceria “CAMPIDOGLIO”.

Continuano l’attività di famiglia ed arricchiscono di nuovi gusti e novità i gelati e le granite (coni da passeggio, conetti, biscotti al gelato, tartufi, semifreddi, cassatelle, mattonelle…) nonché una panna di straordinaria bontà.

Inoltre avviano l ‘ attività di pasticceria diventando un punto di eccellenza per quanto riguarda la lavorazione delle mandorle (Amaretti di Sicilia) e della ricotta (Cannoli e Cassate Siciliane).

Nasce il “BAR CAMPIDOGLIO S.a.s.”.I figli Giuseppe e Sebastiano Calanni Billa, giunti terza generazione, continuano l’attività tramandata dal nonno sfruttando le antiche ricette ed i metodi di lavorazione.

Oggi, come nel lontano 1930, nulla è cambiato nel modo di produrre. I prodotti sono concepiti esattamente come 80 anni fa, rigorosamente in maniera artigianale.

E’ strategica la scelta delle materie prime dove si utilizzano solo prodotti naturali ed alta qualità. Le ricette antiche e tradizionali, e quindi la lavorazione prettamente artigianale, hanno permesso al “CAMPIDOGLIO” di continuare avanti nel tempo raggiungendo risultati commerciali importanti.

Name: Windel GmbH & Co. KG
Description: Die Windel GmbH & Co. KG ist ein international tätiger Süßwarenhersteller und bekannt für seine kreativen und innovativen Geschenkartikel. Sie ist das in Osnabrück ansässige Stammunternehmen der Windel Group und beschäftigt mehr als 250 Mitarbeiter:innen. Gegründet im Jahr 1900 von Ludwig Windel als ein regionaler Süßwaren- und Spirituosengroßhandel, setzt ab den späten 60er Jahren durch kontinuierliche Innovationen eine dynamische Entwicklung ein. Heute ist Windel ein Industrieunternehmen, das seine Produkte weltweit in mehr als 50 Länder exportiert und in vierter Generation von Fred Windel geführt wird.
