Name: Kim Ha Viet
Description:
Vietnam’s leading private sugar trading company, Kim Ha Viet (KHV) was founded in 1984. Since then we have established ourselves at the forefront of producing, supplying and trading renewable products for consumable and industrial uses. Our core products are sugar, molasses, ethanol and carbon dioxide (CO2).

Our products are sourced from nature. Sugar cane is the cornerstone raw material, with cassava and rice also being used. We are proud to use our position within the Vietnamese market place to advance the use of these sustainable raw materials.

With our extensive knowledge and experience in our core businesses in Vietnam, we add value through our warehousing, distribution, transportation logistics operations. Our aim is to be a “win-win" partner to both our clients and suppliers by providing professional, flexible and reliable service to all.

To learn more about us, visit our website http://www.kimhaviet.com

Name: Elizabeth Shaw Ltd
Description:
As one of Britain's best-loved luxury chocolate makers we’re proud of our rich heritage and experience. It's what enables us to create truly irresistible chocolates that are enjoyed all around the world.

With our ever well known product Brand Yosan Bubble Gum and Choyo Chocolate leading the way, we have catapulted to a leading position in the industry with our classics and improved Bubble Gum and Chocolate products.

Name: SUCKERS B.V.
Description: At SUCKERS, we're shaking up the candy world with our eco-friendly treats! We're all about bringing you a burst of joy with every bite, all while keeping our planet happy. Get ready to experience candy like never before.

Name: MisthAmrit
Description:

Name: LB LE CHOCOLAT
Description:
Frères fous de chocolat, notre envie d’explorer cette matière première d’excellence et notre souhait d’entreprendre nous ont poussés à nous lancer dans l’aventure LB le Chocolat.

Pour nous, le chocolat est une source d’inspiration et de création sans limite, quand, pour les consommateurs, gourmands et exigeants, il y a mille et une façons de l’aimer et de le déguster.

Forts de ces constats notre but a été d’imaginer et d’élaborer dans notre chocolaterie à Mougins des produits aux saveurs originales et surprenantes, de nous réapproprier les grands classiques, de satisfaire toutes les gourmandises. Nous avons mis en commun nos expériences et nos compétences, nous avons privilégié les fournisseurs de proximité et un savoir faire artisanal. Avec notre équipe, et en collaboration avec un Meilleur Ouvrier de France, nous avons exploré, testé, goûté, recommencé…

Pour une pause gourmande, pour vos cadeaux d’entreprise, pour vos offres de fin d’année, rien n’a été laissé au hasard pour composer une gamme de chocolats qui séduise le palais des puristes comme celui des amateurs : goûts, textures, couleurs, formes, saveurs et recherche de crus de cacao, aromatiques, équilibrés et éco responsables.

Nous sommes heureux de les partager avec vous.

― Adrien et Romain

Description:
İstanbul’un en köklü semtlerinden biri olan Galata, Osmanlı’nın en eski dönemlerinden beri birçok millete ev sahipliği yapmış kültürel bir kavşak noktası olmuştur.
Tarihi Galata Şekercisi 1973‘de, bu zengin kültürel atmosferde Hasan Ormancı ve Rum şekerci ustası Koçu Mancaridis tarafından Galata Kulesi’nin yanı başında küçük bir dükkanda kurulmuştur.
Yarım asırdır ilk günkü heyecanla sürdürülen şekercilik geleneği bugün üç kuşaklık tecrübe ile Sarıyer’deki üretim tesisinde hizmet vermektedir. Geleneksel akide şekeri reçetesinden ödün vermeyen Tarihi Galata Şekercisi; susamlı, tarçınlı, naneli, limonlu, bergamotlu gibi zengin çeşitleriyle müşterilerinin beğenisini toplamaya devam etmektedir.
İstanbul ve Anadolu’da bir çok seçkin noktada satışı olan Tarihi Galata Şekercisi online olarak da hizmet vermektedir.

Bilgi birikimi ve tecrübemiz sayesinde kurulduğumuz günden bu yana tatlı lezzetlerin ihtiyaç olduğu yerlerde kalitelimizden ve ustalığımızdan söz ettirdik. Kaliteyi uygun fiyatla sunarak reçel, tahin, pekmez ve helva gibi geleneksel lezzetleri yenilikçi anlayışımızla öne çıkmayı daima hedefliyoruz.

Bulunduğunuz her yere tatlı lezzetleri taşıyarak reçelden helvaya lezzlerli tatlar sunuyoruz. Profesyonel ekibimizle gelişiyor ve nesilden nesile lezzet taşıyoruz. Kullandığımız her malzemeye ve ekipmana gerekli özeni göstererek siz müşterilerimiz için her aşamayı kusursuz hale getiryoruz.

Sizler için hedeflediğimiz kalite ve güvenilir hizmet garantisi için her aşamayı önemsiyoruz. Satış öncesi ve satış sonrası daima müşterilerimizin yanında olarak ömürlük bir müşteri memnuniyeti sunuyoruz.

Geniş ve çeşitli ürün yelpazemiz ile mümkün olan en iyi şekilde ve en hızlı biçimde ürünlerimizi sizlerle buluşturmak ve müşteri odaklı yaklaşımımızla kendi sektörümüzde tercih edilen bir marka olmak en temel vizyonumuzu oluşturmaktadır.

Name: The Toasty Smore
Description:
Welcome to Toasty S’more! 

At Toasty S’more, we believe that every moment can be elevated with the perfect s’more. Our passion for creating gooey, crispy, melty goodness goes beyond just a simple campfire treat—we’re here to spark joy and nostalgia in every bite.

Who We Are: We are a small, but mighty team of dessert enthusiasts based in Cibolo, Texas. Our journey started with a love for the classic s’more and has grown into a mission to innovate and deliver the most delightful s’mores experiences to our community and beyond.

Our Mission: To bring people together over the timeless delight of s’mores by offering a variety of premium ingredients, unique flavors, and fun, interactive experiences. Whether it’s a cozy night in, a festive celebration, or a corporate event, Toasty S’more is dedicated to making your moments memorable.

What We Offer:  Artisan Ingredients: Handcrafted marshmallows, gourmet chocolates, and artisanal graham crackers.  Custom S’more Kits: Perfect for gifts, events, or just satisfying your sweet tooth.  Pop-Up Events: Bringing the s’more experience to local markets, festivals, and private gatherings.  Corporate & Private Events: Tailored s’more experiences for team-building activities, weddings, and parties.

Why Choose Us?

Quality: We source the finest ingredients to ensure each s’more is a delightful experience.

Innovation: We’re constantly experimenting with new flavors and combinations to keep your taste buds excited.

Community: We support local suppliers and participate in community events to give back to our hometown.

Join our journey and discover the magic of s’mores like never before. Follow us for updates on new products, events, and sweet inspirations.

Let’s make every moment Toasty! 

#gourmetmarshmallows #marshmallows #artisanmarshmallows #TheToastySmore #SmoreLove #DessertInnovators

Name: Clau Tellini Cake e Sugar
Description:
Bem-vindo à Clau Tellini Cake & Sugar!

Transformamos momentos especiais em experiências doces e inesquecíveis. Com dedicação, criatividade e paixão, criamos bolos e doces personalizados, chocolates, biscoitos e produtos artesanais que refletem o carinho e o cuidado de quem coloca o coração em cada detalhe.

A história da Clau Tellini Cake & Sugar começa com uma memória de infância: o encantamento da proprietária ao ver sua mãe preparando os bolos e os doces das festas em família, espalhando aromas e momentos de alegria pela casa. Essa paixão a acompanhou ao longo dos anos, até que em 2018 decidiu transformar essa inspiração em realidade, começando a criar e compartilhar suas delícias com o mundo.

Desde então, tem se dedicado ao constante aperfeiçoamento, participando de cursos com chefs renomados e conquistando certificações internacionais, como as da Wilton. A busca por excelência é uma meta diária, pois acredita que cada cliente merece um produto não apenas saboroso, mas também visualmente encantador e feito sob medida para suas comemorações.

Na Clau Tellini Cake & Sugar, cada doce é mais do que um simples produto: é uma experiência única, feita 100% artesanalmente, com ingredientes selecionados e um toque especial de amor. Nosso lema, "produtos feitos com as mãos e com o coração", reflete o propósito de entregar qualidade, personalização e emoção em cada criação.

Convidamos você a descobrir mais sobre o universo da confeitaria personalizada e artesanal que oferecemos. Explore nosso portfólio, conecte-se conosco e permita que façamos parte dos seus momentos mais especiais.

Siga-nos no Instagram: @clautellinicakeesugar e inspire-se com criações que unem sabor, arte e emoção.

Name: Untamed Spice
Description:
What started out as an experiment in hydroponic gardening with herbs and peppers soon became a passion to pursue cultivating an organic pepper container garden. We have recently blossomed to eight raised organic beds complete with 21 different pepper varieties among other traditional vegetables. Our current pepper crop includes:

Jalapeño: 2500 – 8000 SHU
Cayenne: 30,000 – 50,000 SHU
Lemon Drop: 15,000-30,000 SHU
Habanero: 100,000 – 350,000 SHU
Thai: 50,000-100,000 SHU
Sugar Rush Peach: ~75,000 SHU
7-Pot Douglah: 950,000 SHU
Trinidad Scorpion: 1,200,000 SHU
Ghost (Bhut Jolokia): 1,001,304 SHU
Carolina Reaper: 2,200,000 SHU
Hot Banana: 5,000 – 10,000 SHU
Gochujang: 1,000 SHU
Anaheim: 500-1000 SHU
Poblano: 1000 – 1500 SHU
Shishito: 100-1000 SHU
Mad Hatter: 500-1000 SHU
Salsa: 25-250 SHU
Lesya: 0 SHU
Bell: 0 SHU

At the end of our first season we had an over abundance of peppers, especially the obscenely fiery chiles that we didn’t know quite how to put to use. A little of those peppers goes a LONG way. So we put on our creative hats and began devising a plan to use these chilis in unique ways. This is how Untamed Spice was born!

We invented recipes that matched the spiciness of the pepper with the sweet of confections. While most people attempt to create potions that will light you on fire and give you bragging rights to your friends, we choose to focus on the flavor of the peppers and marrying those unique tastes with other ingredients to give you, the customer, an enjoyable epicurean experience.

We use only fresh, organic, home or locally grown produce and hand make all our products. We hope you enjoy savoring our goodies as much as we enjoy making them. We are always exploring and conceiving of new recipes so stay tuned for our latest creations.

Name: The Wheat Bake Factory
Description:
Pointing at the shiny colourful snacking section in a supermarket, our daughter demanded biscuits. We felt both guilty and helpless. 
We either had to say "yes" and bear the guilt of introducing Maida or face her cute little cry, "Please Mom." 

We set out on a mission to discover all possible cookie recipes using a variety of nutritious whole grains and nuts. Our primary concern was that we wanted the snack to be maida-free and white-sugar-free. It took a lot of research and many more trials and errors. Nonetheless, we reached our destination. But the journey did not end there. That’s when the magic happened.

All our friends and in a few weeks their friends started asking for cookies for their kids and themselves. How could we say no? We love them too. That's how 'The Wheat Bake Factory' was born.

We are here to offer healthy Wheat-based cookies and Nutrient-rich milk mixes available at your doorstep. All our products are carefully curated. Kids love it. 
We choose our ingredients keeping our daughter in mind. So you can feel completely at ease packing it for their snack time.

You can order the cookies you want from our list and we ship them every Thursday so that you get them before the next week starts. We prepare each batch only after receiving the order so that you receive the most fresh batch made exclusively for you. You know how important the process of cooking for a family with a sober mindset is.
Every week we choose a set of products based on the fresh batch of ingredients we procure. You can order those along with the ones you love.

Product Details:
Each unit of cookies is 250 grams Each unit of Nutri milk mix is 150 grams. 
The prices are inclusive of shipping.
We ship every Thursday so that you get it before the next Monday.

How to order:
DM us for our menu list. You can message your orders to the number mentioned on the menu card.

Name: Elezi, s.r.o.
Description:
Firma Elezi kládla vždy najväčší dôraz na vzťah k zákazníkovi. Svojim prístupom a kvalitnými službami sme sa zapísali do povedomia takmer každého z nich. Záleží nám totiž na tom, aby od nás zákazník odchádzal spokojný a aby nás s radosťou navštívil opäť.

Máme široké portfólio produktov a pri každom z nich dodržiavame striktne tradičné recepty, postupy, ale aj tie najkvalitnejšie suroviny, ktoré sú dostupné na slovenskom trhu. Suroviny, ktorými slovenský trh nedisponuje, dovážame z Česka, Maďarska, Nemecka či Talianska.


Výrobou zmrzliny to u nás nekončí. Okrem predaja zmrzliny vám ponúkame aj jej rozvoz, catering a spoluprácu s individuálnymi klientmi či firmami. Sme známi tradičnou výrobou zákuskov, pečieme pre vás aj na mieru, podľa vašich požiadaviek.

Medzi naše služby patrí pravidelný rozvoz, individuálny rozvoz po dohode a ponúkneme vám aj obal podľa vašich požiadaviek.


Základ našej výroby tvorí ručná práca. Začína to upečením korpusu a pokračuje výrobou plnky, zdobením a narezaním. Žiaden z našich produktov nie je vyrábaný z polotovarov. Sami si vyrábame aj samotné čokoládové či iné polevy a každý deň pre vás pečieme nové a čerstvé zákusky. Pri našich obľúbených veterníkoch pripravujeme klasické vypaľované cesto no a plníme ho pravou šľahačkou, pri ktorej sme obzvlášť opatrný, aby sme ju vyšľahali do dokonalosti.

Description:
Cocoa Sisters is a female-founded ethical chocolate brand on a mission to empower women from bean to bar.

We source our cocoa directly from female farmers, ensuring they receive fair recognition, income, and opportunity for the work they do. In an industry where women perform over 70% of the labour but receive just 20% of the income, we're here to change the narrative.

Founded by Sarah Payne, Cocoa Sisters was born out of a desire to combine purpose with action creating exceptional chocolate that supports the women behind every bean.

We believe that when women are supported, entire communities thrive. Through direct trade, storytelling, and shared values, we’re building a more sustainable and equitable future for cocoa – and inviting others to be part of the journey.

Seit dem 1. Januar 2018 biete ich als selbstständige Beraterin meine Expertise für Unternehmen in der Süßwarenindustrie an. Mein Fokus liegt auf dem Qualitätsmanagement von Rohstoffen und speziell in der Schokoladenherstellung.

Erfahrung:

Vor meiner Selbstständigkeit sammelte ich über Jahrzehnte leitende Erfahrungen im Qualitätsmanagement bei der Alfred Ritter GmbH & Co.KG (Ritter Sport), einem führenden Schokoladenhersteller. In dieser Zeit leitete ich:

Einführungen von Zertifizierungen (IFS, BRC, Halal, Kosher…)
Aufbau und Ausstattung mikrobiologischer und chemisch-physikalischer Laboratorien
Auswahl und Einsatz von Analyse- und Untersuchungsmethoden
Durchführung von Audits und Risikoanalysen
Rohstoff-Qualitätsmanagement inkl. Alternativlieferanten
Arbeitsphilosophie:

Mein Beratungsansatz ist persönlich und flexibel. Ich priorisiere eine direkte Kommunikation mit meinen Kunden, dokumentiere alle Arbeitsschritte und betone eine vertrauensvolle Zusammenarbeit. Durch kontinuierliche Teilnahme an Gremien, Tagungen und Forschungsprojekten halte ich mein Wissen aktuell.

Veröffentlichungen und Funktionen:

Langjährige Mitgliedschaft und Führungstätigkeiten in der IVLV (Industrievereinigung für Lebensmitteltechnologie und Verpackung e.V.)
Mitwirkung in AIF- und FEI-Ausschüssen, Ringversuchen
Engagement an der ZDS (Zentralfachschule der deutschen Süßwarenwirtschaft), u.a. im Beirat der Schokoladetechnik
Betreuung von wissenschaftlichen Arbeiten und aktive Teilnahme an Forschungsprojekten
Zahlreiche Vorträge zu verschiedenen Themen der Lebensmitteltechnologie und -qualität
Veröffentlichungen:

Gemeinsame Veröffentlichung mit Dr. Ziegleder (1992) zur DSC-Methode Temperiergrad

Name: B Patisserie
Description:
Era 2019 e eu, que já tinha 10 anos de experiência trabalhando com doces no Brasil, decidi que era hora de seguir meu sonho de abrir minha própria confeitaria. Assim nasceu a B Patisserie, uma empresa de confeitaria especializada em doces gourmetizados.

Começamos pequenos, atendendo a amigos e familiares que sempre elogiavam nossas sobremesas em festas e eventos. A demanda cresceu rapidamente e decidimos dar um passo além: abrir uma loja física. Mas não seria uma loja comum, teria que ter um toque especial, algo que se destacasse da multidão.

Foi então que decidimos que nossa loja seria aqui em Portugal, um país repleto de cultura e história gastronômica, mas com espaço para novas ideias e sabores. Em pouco tempo, nossa loja se tornou um ponto de encontro para os amantes da confeitaria e os curiosos em busca de novas experiências gastronômicas.

Mas nós sabíamos que o mercado estava mudando e a conveniência era um fator chave para muitos consumidores. Por isso, implementamos serviços de take away e delivery, para atender nossos clientes onde quer que eles estejam.

Hoje, a B Patisserie é conhecida por seus doces gourmetizados, que são uma verdadeira obra de arte em cada mordida. Nosso compromisso com ingredientes frescos, técnicas tradicionais e atendimento ao cliente excepcional continuam a ser os pilares da nossa empresa. E estamos animados para ver onde essa jornada de doçura nos levará a seguir.

Name: Fusen Gum Inc.
Description:
Fusen Gum is more than just bubble gum; it’s a piece of childhood nostalgia that defined an entire generation. In the 1990s and 2000s, its colorful packaging, fruity aroma, and iconic water-based tattoos made it a household name and a symbol of simple, joyful times.

Originally produced in Japan by Marukawa Confectionery, Fusen Gum has carried a legacy of fun since 1947. The word “Fusen” (風船) means “balloon” in Japanese, perfectly capturing the playful spirit of the brand. Each pack was more than candy; it was an experience that kids proudly shared, traded, and collected.

Today, Al Mahasen General Trading LLC, based in Dubai, proudly serves as the exclusive distributor and private label partner of Fusen Gum. Exported across the Middle East, Africa, and Asia, the brand continues to connect generations, bringing back the memories, the taste, and the joy that started it all. Fusen Gum is now expanding its reach to the United States, introducing this nostalgic favorite to a new generation of gum lovers.

Name: Wafer Everbar
Description:
Wafer Everbar is the result of a personal journey by two siblings who grew up in Europe, where wafers were more than just a treat — they were part of childhood.

After relocating to the U.S. and starting our own families, we noticed a gap on the shelves: we couldn’t find wafer bars that matched the quality, flavor, and nostalgia we grew up with. Driven by the desire to recreate that magic using better ingredients, we began experimenting in our own kitchens. After countless trials, Everbar was born — a multi-seed, no-added-sugar, clean-label wafer that brings generations together through taste and simplicity.

Crafted with real seeds, rich in fiber, and fully plant-based, Everbar delivers a satisfying yet light experience that fits seamlessly into everyday life. It’s a moment of pause — made to both delight and reassure.

Today’s consumers are more conscious than ever. They read labels, they ask questions, and they value transparency. That’s why Everbar is formulated with straightforward, recognizable ingredients. Minimal processing and clean formulation aren’t an option for us — they’re the baseline.

While Everbar was created to satisfy individual moments of joy and nourishment, it also meets the growing demand in corporate wellness programs, better-for-you vending, and premium retail channels. We’re bringing a modern perspective to the wafer category — one that blends tradition with functional simplicity.

Headquartered in the U.S., Wafer Everbar is expanding through selective partnerships and shared values.
If you're seeking a snack brand that’s clean, credible, and rooted in purpose — let’s connect.

Name: Dolcier Patisserie & Gelato
Description:
Dolcier verschreibt sich seit vier Generationen der süßen Handwerkskunst – und setzt dabei auf erstklassige Meisterqualität, eine innovative Herstellungsweise mit nachhaltigem Motiv sowie einem zeitlos eleganten Design. Mit einer unverkennbaren Handschrift, die sich der “Leidenschaft für Qualität“ verschreibt, hat Dolcier ein facettenreiches Sortiment sowie eine ganzjährige Klaviatur von Produkten, Geschmäckern, Empfindungen und Freuden erfunden. 

Originelle Rezepturen und traditionsbewusste Herangehensweisen, die von Generation an Generation weitergereicht wurden, dienen als wertvolle Grundlage, mit immer wieder neuen Ideen die Tradition zu revolutionieren. Die zeitlose Eleganz und das vererbte Gespür für das Besondere, machen Dolcier zu einem unverzichtbaren Namen in der süßen Branche. 

Das 1924 gegründete „Maison de Dolcier“ widmet sich mit den Jahreszeiten gehend den exlusiven Genüssen – wie feinsten „Veneziani“-Macarons, edelsten Manufaktur-Lebkuchen in über 40 Sortenvarianten, sommerlichen Gelato- & Sorbetto-Kreationen und filigranen Patisserie-Törten. Sowohl für das sommerliche Speiseeis, das ganz klassisch nach norditalienischer Manier ganz ohne künstliche Zusätze hergestellt wird, als auch für die einzigartigen Manufaktur-Lebkuchen, wurde das Unternehmen in den vergangenen Jahren mit zahlreichen Qualitäts- und Innovationspreisen ausgezeichnet.

Mehr unter www.dolcier.com

OUR RAISON D'ÊTRE

I had a problem to solve, and the WILL to solve it. “Quite good” wasn’t acceptable. I wanted creamy, milky, melt-in-your-mouth dreamy. So I kept at it until I finally created our Undairy chocolate.

At SpaceSweets, we’re redefining the snacking experience with out of this world freeze-dried sweets. Bigger, crunchier, and more intensely flavoured than anything you’ve tasted before, our sweets deliver a totally unique sensory experience that customers love.

We’re a fast-growing, innovative brand that’s shaking up the confectionery industry with premium quality, cutting-edge production technology, and eye-catching packaging. With state-of-the-art UK-made freeze dryers and high-speed packaging technology, we’ve scaled rapidly while ensuring every bite is packed with flavour, crunch, and excitement.

Our mission? To bring fun, flavour, and a whole new way to enjoy sweets to as many people as possible. Whether you’re a retailer, wholesaler, or brand looking to collaborate, we’re always looking for new partners to join us on this exciting journey.

 Want to stock SpaceSweets or collaborate with us? Let’s chat!
 Looking to join a dynamic, fast-growing company? Keep an eye on our careers!

#SpaceSweets #FreezeDried #NextLevelSnacking #Retail #Wholesale #Innovation

Name: HASAR Confectionery
Description:
HASAR ES is Turkmenistan’s largest and most well-known confectionery manufacturer, with over two decades of excellence in crafting sweet treats of unwavering quality. Our products are made using natural ingredients, are GMO-free where required, and are produced under recognized global standards. We hold ISO 9001:2015 and ISO 22000:2018 certifications for quality and food safety, as well as internationally accredited halal certification, enabling compliance with export requirements to Middle Eastern, Central Asian, and other international markets. 

With a skilled workforce, cutting-edge production lines, and a commitment to continuous modernization, HASAR is well positioned as a reliable partner for distributors and retailers seeking consistent quality, scalable production, and access to a diverse confectionery catalogue. Our export footprint spans Qatar, Iraq, Azerbaijan, China, Uzbekistan, Saudi Arabia, Russia, and beyond.

Description:
mmm mati dolci e biscotti è una pasticceria artigianale con sede a Lamporecchio (PT) che produce specialità toscane ed eccellenti lievitati dal 2012. Azienda di prima generazione trova il suo motore nella passione per i lievitati e la pasticceria da forno di Leonardo Mati, fondatore, insieme alla compagna Valentina, appassionata di cibo e vino ed esperta organizzatrice di eventi.

La passione per il nostro lavoro ci ha portato a selezionare con cura tutti gli ingredienti, scegliendo materie prime possibilmente artigianali e toscani.  

Il nostro brand mmm mati dolci e biscotti, nasce ad ottobre 2019, poco prima della pandemia, nato per gioco con l'idea di rinnovarsi non si è fatto intimorire nè dal covid nè dall'attuale situazione.

“mmm” dietro a questo suono si cela un mondo di piaceri nascosti che va al di là delle parole, un sinonimo di goloso e godurioso, che si prova assaggiando i dolci e biscotti creati da Leonardo Mati, un piacere da concedersi senza riserve.

Name: Société Nationale du Sucre (SNS)
Description:
The Société Nationale du Sucre (SNS) is a Public-Private Partnership (PPP) company established following a transparent and competitive international tender process.
Its mission is to lead the development of Mauritania’s first integrated sugar production complex — a strategic project designed to strengthen food security, boost rural employment, and attract long-term investment in the agro-industrial sector.
Through partnerships with public and private stakeholders, SNS aims to establish Mauritania as a regional hub for sustainable sugar production and agro-industrial innovation.
The company welcomes investors and technology partners to join in developing this landmark project that links agriculture, industry, and sustainability.
La Société Nationale du Sucre (SNS) est une entreprise issue d’un Partenariat Public-Privé (PPP), créée à la suite d’un processus d’appel d’offres international transparent et compétitif.
Sa mission est de développer le premier complexe intégré de production de sucre en Mauritanie, un projet stratégique qui contribuera à renforcer la sécurité alimentaire, à dynamiser l’emploi rural, et à attirer des investissements durables dans le secteur agro-industriel du pays.
En collaboration avec des partenaires publics et privés, la SNS ambitionne de faire de la Mauritanie un pôle régional de production sucrière durable et d’innovation agro-industrielle.
La Société Nationale du Sucre accueille les investisseurs, partenaires technologiques et institutions financières souhaitant contribuer à ce projet national emblématique au service du développement économique et de la durabilité.

Name: Truffino Chocolate
Description:
History

Aggregating the experience, capabilities, capacity, and management of several longstanding players in the Mexican food industry, we bring to the market over 100 years of chocolate manufacturing tradition and many more decades of gifting product design and development, frozen pops, dehydrated fruit, and tree nuts manufacturing and packaging. 

Leadership

We are part of Grupo Cimarrón, a diverse corporation from the North of México that participates in many sectors of the local economy. Excelling at what we do, with solid     growth objectives, we position ourselves as essential      players in each of the categories that we decide to service.

Team

We are a bilingual management team that has served the North American market for over twenty years. We run our companies under world-class certified management systems, adhering to strict and disciplined processes and procedures without sacrificing the stability, warmth and execution excellence that characterizes the operations in México.

Sales Model

We sell to the largest big-box retailers in Mexico under our brands and in partnership with their private-label programs. We also provide manufacturing and hosting services to strong market players in the US and service direct-to-consumer retail units that belong to our group of companies.               

Value Proposal

World-renowned certified environments. ISO9001-2018 for Quality Management, SQFII for Food Safety, Sedex-Smeta for Social Responsibility, and CTPAT for US Customs. Dedicated bilingual KAMs for your business with strong product development capabilities. Over 300,000 sq. ft of warehouse and manufacturing space. 

Customers

Walmart, Sam´s, Liverpool, Woolworth, Sanborn´s, Sears, government entities and others.

Name: LARO Sp. z o.o. sp.k.
Description:
Spełniamy oczekiwania najbardziej wymagających klientów, z nami zrealizujesz zamówienia szerokiej gamy produktów, zyskasz elastyczność i pewność dostawy na czas.

Dlaczego warto z nami współpracować?

 Własne zakłady produkcyjne – od selekcji najlepszych surowców po staranne opakowanie, mamy pełną kontrolę nad procesem i jakością popartą systemem IFS.

  Bogata oferta B2B – dostosowujemy się do potrzeb hurtowników i sprzedawców detalicznych, oferujemy różnorodne formaty i elastyczne minima produkcyjne.

  Kompleksowe wsparcie klienta – od doradztwa przy wyborze i tworzeniu smaków, przez logistykę, po szybką reakcję na potrzeby – jesteśmy partnerem, który dba o każdy aspekt współpracy.

Dzięki zaangażowaniu w każdy etap produkcji oraz elastycznemu podejściu do każdego klienta, Laro to nie tylko marka – to synonim jakości i troski.

Name: Maison Duplanteur
Description:
Maison Duplanteur is more than a shop, it is a chocolate factory, because we make our own chocolate. 

We make our chocolate treats with organic cocoa beans from local cooperatives in Madagascar, Peru, Ecuador, Sierra Leone and future cocoa-producing countries in Asia.

We use only 100% organic ingredients and everything is handmade, for an authentic taste. 

We offer chocolate bars, garnished chips, filled bites, chocolate treats, pure cocoa products and limited edition creations for special occasions.

Name: Schoko-Dragee GmbH
Description:
Seit über 40 Jahren steht unsere Manufaktur im westfälischen Rhede für feinste Dragée-Kunst. In der Verbindung von traditionellem Handwerk und modernster Technik entstehen hochwertige Schokoladen-Dragees, die durch Qualität, Geschmack und Perfektion überzeugen.
Wir produzieren Dragees aus erlesenen Rohstoffen – sorgfältig ausgewählt, schonend verarbeitet und mit Leidenschaft gefertigt. Als verlässlicher Partner beliefern wir den Handel, die Industrie und ausgewählte Feinkosthäuser weltweit.
Unsere Eigenmarken und individuellen Private-Label-Konzepte verbinden handwerkliche Präzision mit Innovationsfreude. Von der Rezepturentwicklung über die Beschichtung bis zur Verpackung erfolgt jeder Schritt in unserem Werk – für maximale Qualität, Transparenz und Genuss, der verbindet.

Name: Wholies
Description:
Somos una empresa líder en el nicho de manufactura de gomitas y caramelos funcionales con vitaminas, minerales y neurotrópicos. Nuestro objetivo es proporcionar soluciones nutricionales innovadoras en deliciosas presentaciones.
En Wholies, nos especializamos en el desarrollo de formulaciones personalizadas para productos funcionales que se ajusten perfectamente a las necesidades y objetivos de tu marca. Nuestro equipo altamente capacitado de expertos en nutrición y desarrollo de productos trabaja estrechamente contigo para crear gomitas y caramelos únicos y de alta calidad que satisfagan las expectativas más exigentes de tus clientes.
La calidad es nuestra prioridad principal. Nos enorgullecemos de manufacturar nuestros productos con los más altos estándares, garantizando que cada gomita y caramelo funcional que salga de nuestras líneas de producción sea seguro, eficaz y cumpla con los más rigurosos controles.
Además, nuestro compromiso con la sostenibilidad y el respeto por el medio ambiente se refleja en todo el proceso de manufactura y en nuestros envases finales. Buscamos constantemente formas de mejorar la eficiencia energética y reducir nuestro impacto ambiental.

Name: Bliss Life Candy
Description:
Bliss Life Candy specializes in freeze-drying your favorite sweets, turning them into light, crunchy snacks that enhance the original flavors while offering a fun, new texture. 

We take well-loved candies and transform them into a unique snacking experience, delivering a satisfying treat full of flavor with every bite. 

Our mission is to create delicious snacks that bring joy to candy lovers everywhere.

Our process preserves the original candy's taste and texture while creating an airy crunch. By removing moisture, we enhance the flavors, giving our treats a distinct and enjoyable twist. 

We are passionate about providing high-quality snacks that not only satisfy cravings but also evoke nostalgia, making every bite a delightful reminder of your favorite childhood treats.

Our Product Line-up offers a wide variety of flavors, ensuring there’s something for every type of candy lover.

Name: MON PETIT CHOC
Description:
MON PETIT CHOC, entreprise dévouée à la fabrication artisanale de chocolat, incarne une mission axée sur la création de gourmandises chocolatées, fusionnant la douceur du chocolat avec des fruits à coque Français et des fruits de saison soigneusement choisis. 

L'objectif est d'offrir une expérience sensorielle inoubliable, devenant le choix incontournable pour les amateurs de chocolats.
Guidée par une vision respectueuse de l'environnement et la tracabilité de ses produits, l'entreprise met en avant des ingrédients naturels, le respect de la planète et la recherche constante de la perfection.

La passion pour la qualité, la durabilité et le soutien aux agriculteurs locaux anime la mission, célébrant la saisonnalité tout en visant l'excellence.
Les valeurs fondamentales telles que la qualité supérieure, l'excellence artisanale, la durabilité, la créativité, l'authenticité, la transparence, le respect de la saisonnalité, la satisfaction du client, l'engagement social, ainsi que l'éducation et la sensibilisation, guident chaque action.

La satisfaction du client demeure la mesure ultime du succès, stimulant une quête constante pour dépasser les attentes et contribuer positivement à la société. 

Plongez dans l'art gourmand de MON PETIT CHOC avec ses tablettes de chocolat fourrées et ses produits à base de fruits à coque Français.
Le choix méticuleux des chocolats vise un mélange harmonieux, provenant de divers artisans et chocolatiers cacao-féviers Français, sublimant les coques de chocolat noir ou lait. 

Toutes ces valeurs de MON PETIT CHOC sont au cœur de notre entreprise, elles guident notre engagement continu dans le monde de la fabrication de chocolat artisanal et de produits à base de fruits à coque Français.

Name: Sweet Cuberdons
Description:
Sweet Cuberdons est une entreprise de confiseries à Seraing. Nous fabriquons essentiellement des cuberdons mais aussi des gommes, du sirop de cuberdons et proposons d’autres spécialités comme : des nougats, des chouchous, des loukoums, des orangettes, des pâtes de fruits, …

Chez Sweet Cuberdons, nous mettons tout notre savoir-faire au service des amateurs de cuberdons. Nos recettes de cuberdons sont élaborées par nos maitres confiseurs selon un cahier des charges des plus exigeant, à savoir le respect des traditions mais aussi ce besoin de répondre aux exigences des attentes des consommateurs d'aujourd'hui. 

Nos produits sont fabriqués dans le plus grand respect de nos valeurs : qualité et respect de nos engagements. Notre choix de ne travailler qu’avec des produits naturels nous permet d’obtenir une qualité gustative incomparable. Name: Notes de fève
Description:
***Chocolats millésimés***
Comme le vin, les cacaos sont influencés par le terroir sur lequel ils sont cultivés. Tels des vignerons, les artisans Notes de fève adaptent leur recette à chaque récolte afin de faire ressortir les arômes du terroir dans le chocolat. Notre but ? Que chacun puisse découvrir ses terroirs préférés et son propre style de chocolat. 

***Atelier collaboratif***
Pour faire évoluer le monde du chocolat, nous devons agir en commun. C’est pourquoi la manufacture Notes de fève est également un atelier participatif, où les artisans, les restaurateurs et les professionnels des produits de bouche peuvent venir développer avec nous leurs propres produits.

***Transparence et éthique***
L’éthique et la transparence sont deux piliers de la qualité d’un chocolat. Chez Notes de fève, nous publions de manière transparente les informations importantes sur les planteurs de café et de cacao qui fabriquent nos matières premières. Nous donnons également des informations sur nos recettes et nos procédés de fabrication.

Name: Bene_candy
Description:
GAUDIUM is new company FACONEX ‘s sister who will continue the business that FACONEX started 14 years ago.

We were the first company in Africa and Middle East to manufacture Cotton Candy and Pop Corn, the first in the world to pack its in a beautiful and attractive packaging with IML print and the first in the world to develop Cotton Candy with seven flavors in buckets of 50gr (Strawberry, Banana, Vanilla, Mango, Tutti Frutti, Apple and lemon) .

In 2013 the first in the world have developed natural caramelized Pop Corn with no chemical ingredients, no GMO and no preservatives, is gluten free and has a natural color and flavor .

In 2019 FACONEX was the first company in the world who developed the popping cotton candy with five flavors ( cotton candy mixed with sparkly candy ) .

All our products are produced with natural ingredients and made artisanaly.

We do private label and licences with many companies as LOL & MINION for middle east, Barbie & Hotwhels with Italy, MILLIONS with UK and other licences with Israeli company as Hello Kitty, Unicorne, 
Sonic & Sami the fireman.

In 2022 we were the first in Europe and Africa have been developed new packaging of cotton candy bags with different sizes 50 g and 28 g.

In 2023 we are the first company in the word that have developed the Augmented Reality with our packaging the consumer can scan the QR code and talk and play on darts game with our mascot.

90% of our production is exported to more than 20 foreign countries (Algeria, Bahrain, China, Egypt, France, Gabon, Dubai, KSA, UK, Belgium, Netherlands, USA, Lebanon, Iraq, Libya, South-Korea, Kuwait, Spain, Israel, Ireland , Palestine, Columbia Canada and Qatar…)

We made contracts with our partners in many countries around the world to distribute our products in supermarkets, candy-shops, Gazoil service ..…

GAUDIUM enjoys a remarkable reputation among Moroccan and foreigner consumers thanks to the quality of its products and its innovations.

Name: SAS PATRELLE
Description:
Rejoignez l'aventure sucrée de Patrelle ! 

Bienvenue dans l'univers gourmand de Patrelle, où chaque bonbon est une invitation à l'émerveillement. 

Vous avez une passion pour les plaisirs sucrés, l'art de la pâtisserie et la découverte de saveurs uniques ? Vous êtes au bon endroit ! Chez Patrelle, nous transformons chaque instant en une expérience de dégustation inoubliable. 

En vous abonnant à notre page, vous plongerez dans l'univers sucré de Patrelle, où l'histoire de famille rencontre l'innovation, où la tradition se marie avec la créativité, et où chaque bonbon est une petite œuvre d'art. Notre mission est de répandre la joie à travers chaque bouchée, et nous sommes ravis de partager ce voyage avec vous. 

En tant qu'abonné de Patrelle, vous serez parmi les premiers à découvrir nos nouvelles créations gourmandes, à suivre les coulisses de notre processus de fabrication, et à participer à des concours et des événements exclusifs. Plus qu'une simple page, c'est une communauté gourmande où nous partageons notre amour pour les sucreries. 

Rejoignez-nous dans cette aventure sucrée, et ensemble, créons des moments de bonheur à partager. Cliquez sur "S'abonner" et préparez-vous à être transporté dans un monde de délices sucrés.

Uttam’s core team of experienced and qualified professionals has together ensured that the Group has remained at the forefront of industry developments and breakthroughs.

One of the Group’s greatest strengths is its versatility in adapting its products and services to customer needs through precise engineering solutions.
Of great pride to the Group companies is the ‘Uttam Quality Program’ that is rigidly adhered to and strictly followed. It is the cornerstone on which the Group’s successes have been built.

The Uttam Group has over the years accumulated in-depth and adequate manufacturing and project execution capability to meet the toughest schedules and deliver world-class performance.

The Uttam Group has successfully executed and has under execution several Turnkey/EPC (Engineering Procurement Construction) Projects across the Globe – and especially in Africa and South East Asia, admittedly one of the most challenging of all regions, terms of executing Turnkey Projects.
With various path breaking innovations under its belt, the Group has been in continuous touch with the Australian Sugar Technology through its association with various Sugar Technology Experts and Consulting Organizations for continuous upgradation of technology and de

Name: YOKU MOKU - Middle East
Description:
YOKU MOKU began as the dream of a young confectioner who had the
passion to provide delicious sweets to his community.

In 1932, at the young age of only 14 years old, NORIICHI FUJINAWA,
the founder of YOKU MOKU, moved to Tokyo and began working with
a local confectioner where his experience inspired him to develop a
desire for mastering this craft. Ultimately, this led to a lifelong journey of
providing the highest quality sweets around the world.

The name, YOKU MOKU, which was inspired from the name of a small
town in Sweden surrounded by forests and lakes named JOKK MOKK,
represents the picturesque setting of families warmly welcoming travelers
into their colorful homes. The spirit of YOKU MOKU lies within these
families gathering with their guests to share their love for sweet edibles
together in peaceful harmony.

Today, there are over 100 YOKU MOKU stores around the world keeping
the tradition of spreading smiles during their first bite of sweets.

INDEX Holding in Dubai is the master franchisee in the region.

Name: Ankit Foods
Description:
Welcome to Ankit, a name that has been synonymous with delightful treats since our inception in 1983, right here in the heart of Hyderabad. Our journey has been all about spreading smiles through our wide range of delectable creations – cookies, cakes, biscuits, chocolates, wafers, rolls, crackers, gum, confectionaries, and lollipops. We're not just a company; we're a legacy of love for flavors, a commitment to sustainability, and a dedication to quality.

Bringing Joy to Every Corner of India

From bustling metropolises to the quiet corners of tier 2 and tier 3 cities, Ankit has ventured where few dare to go. Our mission is simple - to bring the delight of our diverse range of products to every corner of India, reaching communities that are often overlooked. We believe that everyone deserves a taste of happiness, regardless of where they live, and we've made it our mission to make that happen.

Sustainability: Powering the Future with Solar Energy

We believe in sustainability, and we walk the talk. All our factories are equipped with solar panels that generate the maximum allowable electricity from the sun. It's our way of contributing to a greener future. We're not just making great treats; we're doing it responsibly.

Our Team: The Heartbeat of Ankit

Our success wouldn't be possible without the dedication of our team. Over 250 of us work directly to ensure you get the best of Ankit. But that's not all. Our journey has touched countless more families indirectly, creating opportunities and livelihoods for communities across the nation.

Quality Without Compromise

We firmly believe that quality should never come with an exorbitant price tag. With a diverse range of over 100 products, we bring you the best at the lowest cost. Our commitment to international standards, best manufacturing practices, FDA approval, and compliance with both European and US standards is unwavering. Name: Chocolate Bean to Bar Machine
Description:
Cocoa Bean and nut processing plant
Multiprocess R is the mini-line by TECNO 3 designed for the production of small amounts of cocoa nibs. It features equipment for roasting beans, debacterisation, crushing and separating nibs. It represents the first phase of the “bean to bar” process (from the cocoa bean to the chocolate bar), which is completed with the other TECNO 3 mini-line Multiprocess C, able to transform cocoa nibs into chocolate.
This is a compact space saving machine; its essential parts are: 1 - Roasting unit 2 - Buffer unit 3 - Peeler 4 - Debacterisation unit 5 - Cocoa bean Winnowing / nut chopping unit 6 - Peel extraction unit

Plant for chocolate, compounds and creams processing
Multiprocess C is the mini-line by TECNO 3 designed for the production of small amounts of chocolate. It features equipment to grind cocoa nibs, mix ingredients, as well as refining and conching equipment, to obtain the liquid chocolate that will need to be shaped.
This is a compact machine with very small overall dimensions, consisting of: 1 - Cocoa nib grinding unit 2 - Mixer for ingredients
3 - Refiner
4 - Belts
5 - Conching tower
6 - Vibrating sieve
7 - Tempering machine (mod. Multiprocess C5)
8 - Vibrating table (mod. Multiprocess C5)
9 - Refrigerating unit (mod. Multiprocess C5) 10 - Discharcing belt (mod. Multiprocess C25 - C50) or collection container

Churan Chacha isn’t just a candy brand —

We’re on a mission to revive the lost charm of desi childhoods — the khatte-meethe memories,  the roadside flavours, the schoolyard secrets, those magical candies that made everything better, and the carefree charm of bachpan ki galliyan.

Our treats are handcrafted, preservative-free, and inspired by dadi-nani ke nuskhe — but it’s more than just what's inside.
What truly sets us apart is the emotion, the memories, the story inside every bite.
At the heart of it all is our Churan Chacha— your nostalgic narrator, mohalla ke sabse sweet uncle, memory-keeper, who made our cildhood memorable.

Description:
Somerset Chocolate Company is a UK artisan chocolate manufacturer specialising in wholesale supply and corporate chocolate gifting for businesses across the United Kingdom.

Founded in 2018 by Master Chocolatier Kellie, the business began in a home kitchen in Bridgwater, Somerset, and has grown into a trusted supplier of small-batch, British-made chocolates to independent retailers, farm shops, visitor attractions, hospitality partners and corporate clients nationwide.

What we make

- Handmade chocolate selection boxes and loose chocolates
- Caramel bars, chocolate slabs and seasonal bars
- -Hot chocolate stirrers and limited-edition collections

Who we work with

- Independent retailers and farm shops
- Visitor attractions and hospitality partners
- Corporate clients seeking premium chocolate gifting

What we offer

- Wholesale chocolate supply across the UK
- Corporate chocolate gifts for clients, staff rewards and events
- Bespoke and branded chocolate gifts (where commercially viable)
- Seasonal collections, including Christmas and limited-edition ranges

Our chocolates are crafted using high-quality Callebaut chocolate sourced sustainably from farmer cooperatives through Cocoa Horizons, reflecting our commitment to flavour, provenance and ethical supply.

How we work
We combine true artisan chocolate craftsmanship with a strong commercial approach. Our focus is on consistent production standards, realistic lead times and dependable delivery, ensuring our partners receive professional service and products that perform in real-world retail and corporate environments.

Our position
We are not a novelty brand or a mass producer. Somerset Chocolate Company is a professional UK chocolate supplier built on quality, reliability and clear communication.

If you are seeking a dependable artisan chocolate manufacturer for wholesale supply, bespoke gifting or seasonal collections, Somerset Chocolate Company delivers British-made, flavour-led chocolate you can rely on.

Name: SBR FOOD CH
Description:
SBR -CH 1027
Solution Polymerized Butadiene Styrene Copolymer
CAS: 9003-55-8 EINECS: 618-370-2 FEMA: N/A HS.CODE: N/A Molecular Formula: (C8-H8.C4-H6)x- Moleclar Weight: 30KGS/CARTON

 SSBR-CH 1027 is a food grade SSBR. Which is produced by hexane solution, the solution copolymerization of butadiene and styrene. Using butyllithium as catalyst, the solvents and volatiles are removed by hot water, dewaterer and expander.

It is an equivalent of SBR FOOD-CH1027. Which used in bubble/chewing gum base and food contact.

Yelibelly Chocolates is an award-winning artisan chocolate company based in the Dallas/Fort Worth area, specializing in creating unique, custom chocolate gifts, confections with logos, and offering immersive chocolate classes. Known for our creativity and craftsmanship, we bring together fine chocolate and innovative designs to elevate any occasion.

Looking to make a lasting impression? Schedule an appointment to visit our facility for custom corporate gifts, wedding favors, or to explore wholesale options. Whether you’re looking to surprise your clients with branded chocolates or host a chocolate class for your team, we’re here to deliver a sweet experience!

Gifts & General Inquiries: hello@yelibelly.com

Wholesale Inquiries: chocolate@yelibelly.com

Name: Tri State Specialties, LLC
Description:
We have over 25 years of experience in the food service industry—specifically in purchasing food ingredients. So we know where to find the highest quality ingredients at the best price to make the finest sprinkles on the market.

We are an American company, but our factories are located in Costa Rica and El Salvador - the heart of cane sugar production. This lets us provide the highest quality ingredients at a competitive price. In addition, our manufacturing facility is GFSI certified and allergen free to insure a wholesome, quality product.

We make sprinkles, shapes, sanding sugars, and nonpareils as they are meant to be: a pure, sweet taste and colorful product that enhances food creations and entices customers back for more.
Location: Greater New York City Area, NY

Our future vision is focused on expanding our offerings and setting new standards in the confectionery industry. Name: PT Berkah Manis Makmur
Description:
PT. Berkah Manis Makmur was established in July 2011 and became one of the few refineries in Indonesia. Constructed on a 12 hectare piece of land located in Cikande, Serang, the refinery provides job opportunities for more than 300 employees.

Hexa Corporation of Thailand in collaboration with its Indonesian counterpart, PT. Trisula Abadi, was appointed to design and build the refinery. After plant trials and commissioning, the refinery started its commercial production in May 2013. The location at Cikande was chosen due to its proximity to water source and major ports. Its accessibility hence facilitates the delivery of goods to our customers' factories.

Our strengths lies in strong team work, innovation and skilled human resources. Supported by an effective and creative management team, we strive to maintain a consistent and high quality product which meets our customers' requirements.

Our company is the largest refinery in Indonesia, with an annual production capacity of 600,000 metric tons. Currently, we have used up to 50% of our total production capacity, giving it plenty of room to develop and expand a wider market share.

Name: PAVEN SARL
Description:
Our dried fruits are carefully roasted and caramelized in Provence.With the help of our small, dynamic, and ambitious team, we aim to bring this ancestral confectionery up to date.

The recipes are crafted by the most indulgent among us and nothing is left to chance! A unique expertise in roasting and caramelization, coupled with a selection of the finest dried fruits from the regions where they are specialties.
It is in the heart of a Provençal vineyard that we draw our inspiration. 
We create and prepare our handmade treats to satisfy your cravings.

Name: Pulmoll Kalfany GmbH
Description:
Die Pulmoll Kalfany GmbH ist eine traditionsreiche Bonbonmanufaktur mit Sitz im Herzen des Schwarzwalds, in Müllheim. Das Unternehmen produziert und vertreibt weltweit hochwertige Hartkaramellen unter den bekannten Marken Pulmoll, Kalfany und Echt Sylter Brisen-Klömbjes.

Unsere beliebte Pulmoll-Pastille wurde 1946 vom französischen Apotheker Jacques Lafarge erfunden und kam 1956 als freiverkäufliches Gesundheitsprodukt auf den deutschen Markt.


Bis heute überzeugt die Pulmoll Classic Pastille durch ihre nahezu unveränderte Rezeptur und ihre natürlichen, wohltuenden Eigenschaften bei Husten und Heiserkeit.

Name: Madò Group Srl
Description:
Madò Group Srl è un'azienda italiana a conduzione familiare dove i valori della tradizione si fondono con la ricerca costante di innovazione. Questo binomio, unito all'utilizzo di manodopera femminile e all'adozione di packaging eco-friendly, completa il profilo di un'azienda d'eccellenza.

La nostra offerta è rivolta sia al consumatore finale, tramite il sito e-commerce Madò Creme, che alle imprese, tramite il marchio Madò Horeca progettato per fornire ai clienti aziendali una vasta gamma di creme spalmabili in diversi formati e prodotti tipici italiani e campani.

L'azienda esporta in Italia, Europa e nel resto del mondo, questo rende i prodotti di Madò accessibili ad un vasto pubblico, supportando la convinzione dell'azienda che l'eccellenza debba essere alla portata di tutti.

Name: Dona Pérola Chocolateria para Eventos
Description:
Desde 2013, espalhamos alegria e sabor, conquistamos corações e fidelizamos nossa essência em cada cliente, parceiro e colaborador.
A casa ainda é pequena, mas incrivelmente apaixonante, somos especialistas em doces que trazem consigo a magia do chocolate para eventos especiais. Aqui, oferecemos soluções que vão além do comum - seja customizado ou personalizado, estamos aqui para transformar cada momento em algo único e memorável. 
Acreditamos que cada evento é único, e nossos doces refletem essa crença. Oferecemos opções personalizadas para tornar seu evento verdadeiramente especial.
Aqui, cultivamos mais do que doces; cultivamos uma cultura de respeito. Respeito pelos nossos clientes, parceiros e colaboradores, pois sabemos que são eles que nos impulsionam para o sucesso.
Cada escolha que fazemos é uma decisão para avançar nossa história. Queremos ser parte da sua história, criando momentos doces que serão lembrados para sempre.
Produzir chocolates finos de qualidade é apenas o começo. Nossa missão vai além, é sobre preservar o sabor, o requinte e a inovação. Buscamos promover felicidade em cada pedacinho de chocolate que criamos, garantindo as melhores sobremesas para celebrar e presentear.
Se você valoriza experiências únicas, um ambiente de respeito e a paixão por doces feitos com carinho, então a Pérola é o lugar perfeito para você. 
Chocolates que contam histórias, transformamos seu evento em uma narrativa doce."

Name: Chunkz Chocolate Shop
Description:
At Chunkz, we specialise in crafting premium pistachio cream with kataifi, bringing authentic Middle Eastern-inspired flavours to dessert lovers worldwide. We are also preparing to launch our luxury chocolate bar, developed in collaboration with My Choc Shop.

Our mission is simple—to provide high-quality, ready-to-use ingredients that make it easier for dessert businesses, home bakers, and food lovers to create exceptional treats effortlessly.

Our Flagship Product
 Chunkz Pistachio Kataifi Cream – A rich, creamy pistachio spread infused with crunchy kataifi, perfect for both professional and home use. It offers a luxurious texture and authentic flavour, making it an essential ingredient for cakes, pastries, kunafa, and desserts.

Our Products & Services
 5kg Catering Tubs – Ideal for dessert parlours, cafés, and bakeries, ensuring consistency and convenience for large-scale production.

 220g Retail Jars – A consumer-friendly size for home bakers, small businesses, and dessert enthusiasts who want to explore premium pistachio flavours in their recipes.

 Wholesale & Bulk Supply – We work with businesses, distributors, and retailers to supply high-quality dessert ingredients.

 E-commerce & Marketplace Expansion – Soon to be available on Amazon, Etsy, and eBay, making our premium spreads accessible to everyone.

With pistachio desserts trending globally, Chunkz is bringing innovation and indulgence to the market with exceptional taste, quality, and versatility.

Whether you're a professional chef, bakery owner, or dessert enthusiast, Chunkz Pistachio Kataifi Cream is designed to elevate your creations and set new standards in dessert innovation.

 Let’s spread the indulgence!

#Chunkz #PistachioKataifi #LuxuryDesserts #DubaiChocolate #Baking #FMCG #FoodInnovation #DessertBusiness

Name: PELUSO1964
Description:
LA FAMIGLIA PELUSO: UN DOLCE CONNUBIO TRA INNOVAZIONE E TRADIZIONE.
La storia di Peluso ha inizio nel 1964 con un piccolo laboratorio artigianale a Modica,
perla del territorio siciliano. La fede incrollabile nelle antiche tradizioni dolciarie,
intrecciata all’amore per i sapori della nostra amata Sicilia e al rispetto per i tempi della natura,
continua ad essere la componente di una “ricetta magica”, che conferisce qualità e bontà
a tutti i nostri prodotti, che profumano di forno proprio come una volta.
Centrale è l’attenzione verso la nostra clientela, che amiamo sorprendere ed emozionare
con dolci dal gusto unico e inimitabile, scegliendo sapientemente i migliori ingredienti
e ricercando ogni giorno l’equilibrio perfetto tra naturalezza e bontà.
Dall’appassionata fantasia del nostro team, nascono la prelibata pasticceria a base di mandorle,
l’inimitabile cioccolato di Modica IGP, un’ampia offerta di semilavorati per pasticceria
e tanto altro ancora. Tutte le bontà Peluso sono realizzate con quel tocco di innovazione
che fa pensare alle generazioni future. La qualità, la sicurezza e gli aspetti nutrizionali
di tutti i nostri prodotti sono i valori che ogni giorno ci guidano, portando avanti la tradizione
con l’evoluzione, per raggiungere e mantenere nel tempo la nostra sfida: l’eccellenza del prodotto.

Name: Darimex 98
Description:
Darimex 98 is a family company founded in 1998. The company was created to restore the manual production of chocolate bonbons in Bulgaria. Bonbons loved by generations of Bulgarians were stopped by production in the mid-1990s and Darimex 98 aims to bring consumers back their favorite products, according to the original recipes. But besides familiar products, proven technology and experience, it is equally important for us to respond to all new trends, tastes, requirements …
That's why the motto of the company is "With the Traditions in the Future!".
Our passion is chocolate, so we think products should be produced with lots of care, love, quality raw materials and technology! Our excitement is great from the idea of the product, its development, the tasting.... mm, the packaging and finally the greatest pleasure to see the delight that you are experiencing from our product!

Chocolate is a pleasure and enjoyment that no one should be deprived of! That's why it's important for us to create happiness for everyone, including people who eat healthily! 
And the new brand "Dar's" was soon created. 
Under this brand are produced premium healthy products - sugar-free, gluten-free, fiber-rich for vegans and diabetics.

2009 we opened a new factory covering all European Food Safety Requirements:
- 2011 we received International Food Safety Certificate (IFS) - International food standard /
- 2014 - FSSC 22000 certificate

Our staff has a long experience in the industry, which guarantees a truly high professionalism and quality of production. The company is flexible and open to innovation, while striving to maximize the needs of consumers. In addition, products are developed for different countries to suit specific tastes - for example, different packaging, style, inscriptions, taste, and so on. In addition to the domestic market, we export for Germany, Sweden, Hungary, Romania, Georgia, Mongolia, Malta, Saudi Arabia and others.

Verlässlichkeit, Qualität und partnerschaftliche Zusammenarbeit prägen unser Handeln – gegenüber Kunden, Lieferanten und Mitarbeitenden. Nachhaltigkeit, Effizienz und kontinuierliche Verbesserung unserer Produkte und Prozesse stehen im Zentrum unseres Wachstums.

Nosso diferencial está na parceria de longo prazo com empresas líderes globais, algumas conosco há quase quatro décadas. Nosso trabalho contribuiu para o crescimento de diversos parceiros que hoje são referências em inovação.

At Konfiz, we've been delighting taste buds with crunchy munchies and bakery essentials for over 2 years. 
From irresistible snacks to sweet treats and baking must-haves, we're your one-stop destination for all things indulgent and delicious. Whether you're craving a quick bite or planning your next bake, Konfiz brings quality, flavor, and freshness to every shelf.
Proudly serving joy, one bite at a time.

Name: Anjar Chocolatier
Description:
A Message from our Founder: 

Although Anjar Chocolatier emerged from my entrepreneurial spirit, my love for chocolate has deeper roots. In 1929, my great-grandfather, a German immigrant to Brazil, founded a candy business that thrived in our family for over 70 years, and is still in operation today. With chocolate in my blood, I dedicated myself to mastering the craft. After graduating from Indiana University, I decided to further my passion by studying French Chocolate and Confectionary Arts at Ecole Ducasse. This journey led me to found Anjar Chocolatier, where we use ethically sourced, high-quality ingredients to offer our customers a unique chocolate experience, honoring my Brazilian, German, and Lebanese heritage through our name, flavors, and techniques.

Name: Creekside Mallow
Description:
Creekside Mallow was born from a backyard campfire and sleepover when our daughter, Grace, had a light bulb moment and rushed into the house and yelled, “We should open a gourmet s’mores store!” We didn’t act immediately but the idea stayed in our minds, prompting conversations about how the store would have to revolve around an exceptional marshmallow. Our search came up empty in looking for a source for better than average mallow. We began to research and experiment with recipes until they came up with the perfect hand-crafted mallow.
Our experiments lead to testing, and family and friends became our “focus group”. The reactions were encouraging and that encouragement lead to the development of an idea of how to sell our new product. We decided that we would build a catering business around our mallows. A S’mores bar that would allow people to make a gourmet S’more using our mallows and different chocolates and sauces.
Our first event was a hit! We were beginning to think we had something and as word got out, we found that we were getting calls from all over the area. Several times at each event customers would tell us that we needed to sell the mallows in stores. Our story may have ended there, we had no idea how to get a product of our own into stores, much less how to package, market, and distribute it. A chance meeting in Boise introduced us to the Idaho Small Business Development Center and a host of advisors and mentors. Working with the SBDC, which we still lean on from time to time, was the break we desperately needed.

 In 2017 fate smiled on us again when we found our current store and commercial kitchen location in downtown Caldwell Idaho. This meant we would no longer be needing to rent space in someone else’s kitchen and we could really pursue wholesale accounts, along with having a small retail location of our own.
Partnerships, collaborations, and terrific people in many positions have brought us to our current state, we appreciate everyone of them.

Name: Canadies Ltd.
Description: Canada’s got a sweet side — and we thought it deserved a candy with just as much character. Canadies is our answer: bold maple butter candy crafted to celebrate Canadian flavor in a fresh, playful way. Proudly rooted in Canadian spirit, made for taste buds everywhere.

Name: Hope Chocolates
Description: We founded Hope Chocolates in 2022 as a way to improve the lives  of men and women recently released from incarceration. Starting over is difficult. Finding employment with a prison record is a challenge. And developing marketable skills is tough. We wanted to change that. So we started Hope Chocolates. Our goal is to grow the company by offering high quality, premium products so that we can hire more employees that are looking for employment. We train them, mentor them, disciple them, and work with them.

Depuis plus de 20 ans, Les Gourmandises de Sophie enchante petits et grands avec des confiseries choisies parmi les meilleures douceurs de France et d’Europe.

Chaque confiserie est emballée à la main en collaboration avec un ESAT local, valorisant un savoir-faire artisanal et un engagement humain fort.

Avec Les Gourmandises de Sophie, la confiserie ne se cache plus : elle se partage et se vit comme une expérience unique ! Prêts à succomber ?

(Geschmacksrichtungen mit Kaffeevarianten, wie Espresso, natülich ausgenommen) 

Bei ENERLADE bietet jeder Bissen Schokolade eine Kombination aus Genuß und Energie. Dank der festen Form wird das Guarana langsamer in den Körper abgeben und führt zu einer steten Koffeinzufuhr. 

Neben dem abegrundeten Geschmack, legen wir auch Wert auf durchdachte Zutaten und moderne Verpackungsweisen: 
- Fair Trade: ENERLADE kooperiert mit der Rainforest Alliance für den besten Kakao

Name: EIKODO VIETNAM CO.,LTD.
Description:
EIKODO Vietnam belongs to EIKODO Holdings in Japan (formerly Suzuki Eikodo), a comprehensive confectionery company with a history of over 140 years. In addition to its manufacturing business in its own factories and group companies, the company takes pride in its leading market share in various fields such as planning and selling sweets for game centers, as well as exporting Japanese confectionery and beverages overseas.

EIKODO Vietnam is a Japanese-invested candy manufacturer in the North of Vietnam. We aspire to create sweets that fulfill people's hearts. To pursue this mission, we are dedicated to creating products that are not only delicious but also safe and uniquely tailored to the preferences of our valued customers.

The factory is located in Thang Long Industrial Park II, Hung Yen, Vietnam, with an area of 10,000 m2 and has a design capacity of over 2.760 Tons of products/year, specializing in OEM/ODM solutions and OBM for hard candy, jelly candy, and lollipops, all produced under strict FSSC 22000, FDA, HALAL, and food safety standards. We combine modern technology with skilled craftsmanship to deliver high-quality confectionery products tailored to each client’s unique market needs.

With many years of experience in the confectionery industry, EIKODO has accumulated a lot of experience with a team of skilled workers and highly specialized engineers to meet the development needs of society and the world.

Currently, EIKODO Vietnam has developed a product distribution system with agents and sales centers covering all of Vietnam and has exported to other countries such as Japan, Korea, Cambodia, China, Taiwan, and Russia. We always learn and develop all quality products that meet international standards in the EU, the US, Australia, Middle East.

With flexible OEM/ODM services, customized flavors and packaging, and a dedicated export team, we aim to make every collaboration efficient, reliable, and rewarding.

Name: A Thousand Delights
Description:
A Thousand Delights to manufaktura czekolady premium z serca Rzeszowa, w której tradycja rzemiosła spotyka się z nowoczesnym designem i najwyższą jakością składników.

Tworzymy ręcznie praliny, trufle i monoporcje, korzystając wyłącznie z najlepszych światowych produktów – czekolady Valrhona, świeżej śmietany, naturalnych owoców, orzechów i przypraw. Każdy element – od receptury, przez formę, aż po eleganckie opakowanie – dopracowujemy z dbałością o detal. Naszym celem jest, aby każdy klient doświadczył małego luksusu, który zostaje zapamiętany.

 Co oferujemy?

Praliny i trufle premium – unikalne, ręcznie tworzone słodkości, wyróżniające się smakiem i wyglądem.

Monoporcje i desery – nowoczesne, artystyczne propozycje inspirowane światowym fine pastry.

Personalizacja bombonierek – pełna możliwość dostosowania opakowań do potrzeb klienta: logo, kolorystyka, nadruki, indywidualne projekty.

Rozwiązania B2B – idealne dla hoteli, resortów, SPA, salonów samochodowych, butików i firm premium, które chcą zaoferować swoim gościom i partnerom coś więcej niż standard.

Upominki biznesowe i okolicznościowe – ekskluzyjne zestawy na święta, konferencje, wydarzenia i prezenty VIP.

 Nasze produkty sprawdzają się wszędzie tam, gdzie liczy się pierwsze wrażenie, prestiż i dbałość o klienta.
Wierzymy, że praliny mogą być nie tylko deserem, ale też narzędziem budowania emocji, lojalności i wizerunku marki.

 A Thousand Delights – bo małe luksusy tworzą wielkie doświadczenia.

Name: Thai Sweets Design
Description:
Thai Sweets Design is where artistry meets indulgence! We are a passionate team dedicated to transforming ordinary sweets into extraordinary masterpieces through the delicate craft of handmade, 2D, and 3D sugar and chocolate decoration.

Our commitment to quality extends beyond visual appeal; we proudly hold BRC, HACCP, GHP, and HALAL certifications. We use only the finest ingredients in a carefully monitored process to ensure that each creation not only looks exquisite but also upholds the highest standards of quality and safety.

At Thai Sweets Design, we take pride in creating edible works of art that captivate your visual senses. Our skilled artisans bring creativity to life, handcrafting intricate designs with meticulous attention to detail.

What sets us apart is our commitment to customization. We understand that every celebration and every season is unique, and so are your preferences. That's why we collaborate closely with our clients to bring their visions to reality. Whether it's elegant wedding sugar flowers or cheerful and cute Christmas decorations, we turn your sweet dreams into edible wonders.

Name: Schaffer Sugar Services
Description:
We back our high-quality engineering and design services with unsurpassed technological computer software support and knowledge. With our engineering and service team, we have the resources to ensure world-class delivery of service to our sugar industry clients. Moreover, Schaffer Sugar Services is a division of Crompion International that provides specialty stainless steels and specialty industrial products that enhance the performance of our global customers.

Furthermore, we are a legacy of the Schaffer Sugar engineering group that developed more than nine-hundred sugar engineering projects in more than 60 countries since the 1950s. In recognition of our success and corporate responsibility overseas, our legacy company was awarded the inaugural U.S. Department of State’s Award for Corporate Excellence in 1999.

We received this award in recognition of our high standards of responsible business conduct and how a U.S. company represents the American values and business practices. We incorporate our legacy experience and ethics in the local and international sugar industry, with experienced engineers led by Mr. George Schaffer, and our new, reliable, and innovative technologies.

Name: Falcon Group

Name: Perrino Pregiata Pasticceria
Description:
Autenticità, convivialità, impegno e passione, sono queste le colonne portanti che sorreggono la longeva attività della famiglia Perrino. Da generazioni, ci dedichiamo all’accoglienza e alla cura dei clienti. 

Siamo i fratelli Damiano e Lorenzo Perrino, e abbiamo finalmente deciso di condividere con voi alcuni segreti della nostra professione, aprendo le porte della nostra Pregiata Pasticceria al grande pubblico. Il nostro desiderio è quello di regalarti la possibilità di scoprire gli straordinari prodotti dei nostri chef pâtissier, esperti e appassionati, che costantemente studiano, si aggiornano e affinano le tecniche di lavorazione.

Buona parte della nostra attività consiste nel lavoro di ricerca gastronomica, per riuscire a regalarti un prodotto d’eccezione, senza precedenti. Il nostro desiderio è quello di concederti la possibilità di rivivere, attraverso le nostre produzioni, le stesse emozioni che noi abbiamo la fortuna di vivere quotidianamente.

Per noi Perrino, l’artigianalità è l’elemento che ci consente di emergere e di distinguerci, frutto della trasformazione della passione in professione, ed è la qualità che più ci riconoscono i nostri affezionati clienti.
 
Condotti dalla bussola della tradizione nel vasto mare della pasticceria, abbiamo elaborato un prodotto artigianale sorprendente, proiettato al futuro, ma con lo sguardo rivolto al passato. 

Lasciati incantare dall’aroma fragrante, dai gusti golosi e dalla qualità sublime delle materie prime, selezionate per soddisfare i palati più raffinati. Abbiamo scavato nella tradizione dolciaria e riportato alla luce sapori antichi, per custodirli e condividerli attraverso la nostra produzione. 

L’impulso del pensiero creativo associato ad un tipo di lavorazione lenta e accurata, ci hanno consentito di plasmare una realtà artigianale di alta qualità, che sforna i prodotti ideali per poter sorprendere i palati più esigenti di amici e familiari e di chiunque ami la cura dei particolari e i dolci pregiati.

Name: Sweet Tree by Browns
Description:
We are a small business offering a wide range of unique and personalised products made from Belgian chocolate and branded confectioneries. 

We sell our products online via our own website, as well as numerous other online retailers. We also supply some brick and mortar shops, as well as a hotel chain. We work on both a drop-ship and wholesale basis. 

We also specialise in corporate gifting for any occasion.

Name: LIPS Chocolate & More
Description:
Une nouvelle adresse ouvre ses portes aux amateurs de bon goût et de belles choses. Chocolats, confiseries et objets pour les sublimer, nous avons tout pensé pour vous faire plaisir. 

Découvrez nos gourmandises et choisissez leurs écrins, nous nous occupons du reste...

Name: Sanam Authentic Sweets
Description:
Sanam is the preferred brand for connoisseurs of authentic South Asian sweets worldwide. Founded in 1963 by Haji Abdul Ghafoor Akhtar, Sanam, meaning "the loved one," has won the hearts of sweet enthusiasts with its genuine confections and traditional savories.

With a rich heritage spanning over six decades, Sanam has become synonymous with quality and tradition. Each piece of our carefully crafted sweets reflects the dedication and passion that began with Haji Abdul Ghafoor Akhtar's vision. Our recipes, passed down through generations, ensure that every bite is a taste of authenticity and excellence.

As a cherished homegrown brand with international acclaim, Sanam is headquartered in Manchester, United Kingdom, and is celebrated as one of Britain’s most renowned immigrant success stories. Our journey from a small local shop to a globally recognised name stands as a testament to the hard work and dedication of our founding family and the continued commitment to maintaining the highest standards.

Beyond our products, Sanam is deeply embedded in the community. We take pride in our role in cultural celebrations, providing the sweets that make festivals and special occasions truly memorable. Our commitment to excellence and authenticity has not only earned us loyal customers but also numerous accolades and awards.

Join us at Sanam and experience the magic of South Asian sweets, where tradition meets innovation, and every piece tells a story of love, heritage, and craftsmanship.

Name: The Counter Confectionery
Description:
Classic confectionery, with a nostalgic twist.

We are a small team of three passionate foodies, working out of a tiny kitchen in Craighall Park, Johannesburg. Our stories started over three decades ago, learning how to cook and loving all things food from a young age; mostly under the guidance of our moms. A lot of the recipes we use today still come from those early days. Meg, Ian and Vicky having been working together for close to thirteen years - we found early on that we had a magic bond; a yin and yang approach to food and events. While the main focus of our kitchen is confectionery production, we are also experienced event caterers - having catered functions across the country for over thirteen years.

If you visit our kitchen, you'll find us elbows-deep in sugar and butter, surrounded by fudge and other delicious confectionery. We specialise in delicious confectionery and baked goods; and are masters at gifting - whether it be for a large corporate delivery, or a small personalised delivery.

Name: Manjra Sugar Industries Pvt. Ltd
Description:
About Us

At Manjra Sugar Industries, we are committed to excellence in sugar production, refining, and allied industries. With a strong legacy in the sugar sector, we prioritize innovation, sustainability, and community development to create long-term value for stakeholders.

Our Vision
To be a leading sugar manufacturing company recognized for quality, efficiency, and sustainable practices, contributing to the growth of the agricultural and industrial sectors.

Our Mission
	•	Deliver high-quality sugar and by-products with industry-leading efficiency.
	•	Empower farmers with modern techniques and fair trade practices.
	•	Adopt sustainable manufacturing processes to minimize environmental impact.
	•	Drive innovation through technology and research in sugar production.

Our Products & Services
	•	Premium-grade sugar production
	•	Ethanol and by-products manufacturing
	•	Power generation from bagasse
	•	Agricultural support and development for sugarcane farmers

Why Choose Manjra Sugar Industries?
	•	State-of-the-art production facilities
	•	Commitment to sustainability and eco-friendly practices
	•	Strong partnerships with farmers and stakeholders
	•	High industry standards in quality and safety

We believe in sugarcane as a source of energy, prosperity, and progress, and we are dedicated to shaping a sustainable future for the industry.

Let’s connect and build a sweeter future together!

Name: Baccara B2B
Description:
Tworzymy produkty dla profesjonalistów z branży HoReCa.
Baccara to firma rodzinna, która od ponad 30 lat jest obecna w polskim sektorze gastronomicznym. Łączymy rodzinną tradycję z trendami w gastronomii i najlepszymi technikami sztuki kulinarnej. 
Nasza firma jest partnerem branży HoReCaa, oferującą produkty dla sektora cukierniczego, gastronomicznego i hotelarskiego. W naszym asortymencie znajdują się produkty wysokiej jakości, ręcznie produkowane; wyroby garmażeryjne, pierogi, wędliny, zupy, dania gotowe, dodatki do dań, ciasta, ciastka, torty i desery. 
Baccara od lat cieszy się uznaniem wśród profesjonalistów z branży gastronomicznej. Dzięki naszemu wieloletniemu doświadczeniu i praktycznej wiedzy biznesowej, możemy zaoferować naszym klientom najwyższej jakości produkty – bez kompromisów.
