Name: La fABrique à Sucres
Description:
Créée en 2022, La fABrique à Sucres est une SAS Coopérative réunissant des agriculteurs des Hauts-de-France et des acheteurs partenaires répartis sur le territoire national. Nous implanterons la première microsucrerie biologique de France, dédiée à la production de sucre brut de betterave bio — un produit aujourd’hui inexistant sur le marché national.
À travers plusieurs phases de tests à échelle pilote et avec l’appui d’experts qualifiés, la coopérative a développé et breveté un procédé d’extraction innovant, caractérisé par une consommation énergétique réduite, l’absence totale d’additifs, et la préservation des minéraux naturellement contenus dans la betterave. Il offre également une solution alternative durable aux apiculteurs, qui pourront l’utiliser pour nourrir leurs colonies durant l’hiver.
A termes, l’objectif est de diversifier les produits sortants pour allonger le temps d’utilisation de l’outil et diversifier les sources de revenus.
Ce projet s’inscrit pleinement dans une dynamique de relocalisation industrielle, de valorisation des filières agricoles bio régionales, et de réduction de l’empreinte carbone liée aux importations de sucre.
Il constitue ainsi un levier concret de transition écologique et économique au service du territoire des Hauts-de-France.

Name: Nostalgic Confections
Description:
Nostalgic Confections is a living continuation of four generations of candy makers — a place where heritage craft, personal memory, and creative storytelling come together. What began as a way to preserve family traditions has grown into a three-part publishing studio exploring the culture and consciousness of making.

At the center is Confectionally Yours Journal, our home for stories, recipes, and seasonal reflections. It brings together the approachable, joyful side of the craft — the flavors, rituals, and small traditions that connect people across generations.
https://confectionallyyours.nostalgicconfections.com

Alongside it lives The Palimpsest, our editorial imprint focused on the deeper layers: mastery, attention, lineage, the inner life of a maker, and the philosophy behind a lifetime of craft. Each piece explores how hands learn, how traditions shape identity, and how creativity becomes a form of consciousness.
https://thepalimpsest.nostalgicconfections.com

Rounding out the trio is The Orphicon, a weekly micro-blog devoted to orphan and historical images — a visual archive that celebrates the quiet dignity of work, the evolution of candy making, and the emotional resonance of the past. Curated with full attribution and ethical sourcing, The Orphicon preserves the photos that might otherwise be forgotten.
https://thepalimpsest.nostalgicconfections.com/orphicon

Together, these three platforms form the heart of Nostalgic Confections:
• Confectionally Yours Journal — recipes, stories, seasons
• The Palimpsest — essays on craft and creativity
• The Orphicon — image-based history and emotional archives

Our mission is simple: to honor where we come from, share what we’ve learned, and invite others into a community built on curiosity, generosity, and the love of making.

Website: https://nostalgicconfections.com

Name: Cacao: guilt-free chocolates
Description:
A few years ago we were told we shouldn’t eat chocolate because almost all mainstream chocolate contains west African cocoa which is harvested by child slaves. This was a problem because we love chocolate, but we couldn’t turn a blind eye to child slavery. The solution was to make our own, using ethical cocoa. It tasted so much better than mass produced chocolate that we decided to set up Cacao. But it was not enough to be ethical, we strive to live an environmentally sustainable life (driven by our ecologist son), so the chocolate also had to be sustainable, hence Cacao: guilt free chocolates.
We only buy cocoa from countries where child slavery is not known to exist in the cocoa industry and where deforestation is not an issue. Our other major ingredient, Arenga sugar, from comes the conservation NGO, Masarang. Not only does this sugar add a depth and complexity of flavour to our chocolate but it is produced with a minimal carbon footprint and is associated with reforestation. 
However, it is clearly not enough for us to simply have an ethical and sustainable business, our product has to taste great. As any chef will tell you, ingredients are key. We use predominantly international award-winning single-estate cocoa grown by Jose Saguban in the Philippines and single-origin Fino de Aroma Ecudorian Arriba cocoa. Although not generally appreciated with chocolate, freshness is vital. To quote Will Goldfarb of Room4Dessert: “If you don’t want chocolate (made) fresh for you, (you) probably shouldn’t be a pastry chef”. We make our chocolate in small batches and we do not keep significant stocks, so that the chocolate we sell is fresh and at its best.
We hope you will buy our chocolates for their taste and then engage in a conversation about sustainability and ethics. Only a few years ago we, like many others, were completely ignorant about the involvement of the mainstream chocolate industry in child slavery and massive deforestation and we hope you will spread the word.

1925 fiel der Startschuss für die ersten Fruchtriegel von Dr. Balke. Damals wie heute liefern Fruchschnitten schnelle Energie. und seit 1988 sind Fruchtschnitten in Bio-Qualität im Programm. 1990 brachten die Genussspezialisten bei Liebhart Schokoladen und schokolierte Früchte, Kekse und Gebäckspezialitäten auf den Markt. Seit 2005 schätzen Genießer die
Liebharts Privatbrauerei für ihre Bierspezialitäten, Limonaden und Destillate in Bio-Qualität. 2013 übernahm die Unternehmensgruppe den traditionsreichen Bonbon-Spezialisten Wiedenbauer. 

Produkte von Liebharts sind in Bio-Märkten und Bio-Supermärkten,
in Reformhäusern und Naturkost-Geschäften und im gehobenen

Name: Şekerci Mustafa A.Ş.
Description:
Şekerci Mustafa olarak, geleneksel tat ve çikolata tutkunlarına unutulmaz lezzet deneyimleri sunmak için buradayız. Geleneksel tatların modern dokunuşlarla buluştuğu bir dünyada, kalite ve özgünlük odaklı, doğru çözüm ortaklarıyla üretim yapan uluslararası bir marka olmak için yola çıktık.Misyonumuz, müşterilerimize en taze ve en lezzetli tatlıları sunarken, Türk tatlılarının eşsiz zenginliğini ve kültürel değerlerini korumaktır. Kaliteli malzemeler ve ustalıkla hazırlanan ürünlerimizle, damaklarda unutulmaz bir iz bırakmayı hedefliyoruz. Şekerci Mustafa olarak, müşteri memnuniyetini her şeyin üstünde tutuyoruz. Müşterilerimize özenle seçilmiş en kaliteli malzemelerle üretilen ürünler sunarak, lezzet yolculuğunda onları memnun etmek en büyük önceliğimizdir. Ekibimiz, her bir ürünümüzü büyük bir özen ve sevgiyle hazırlayarak, her ısırıkta kaliteyi hissetmenizi sağlar. Değerlerimiz arasında yaratıcılık, özgünlük, dürüstlük ve insana saygı yer alır. Ürünlerimizi hazırlarken geleneksel yöntemleri modern tekniklerle birleştirir ve özgün tatlar yaratırız.Müşterilerimize karşı dürüstlük ve şeffaflıkla yaklaşırız, onlarla güçlü bir ilişki kurmayı ve onları ailemizin bir parçası gibi hissettirmeyi amaçlarız. Şekerci Mustafa olarak, tatlıları sevgiyle yapıyor, tutkuyla sunuyoruz. Sizlere eşsiz tatlılarımızı deneyimleme fırsatı sunmak için sabırsızlanıyoruz. Aramıza katılın ve lezzet dolu bir yolculuğa çıkın!

Şekerci Mustafa sets out with the goal of becoming an international brand with a focus on traditional flavors enriched with modern touches. Aiming to preserve Turkish flavors, the brand strives to produce high-quality and authentic products. Customer satisfaction is prioritized, and the carefully crafted products made with the finest ingredients are presented with love. Traditional methods are combined with modern techniques to create unique flavors. Values such as transparency, honesty, creativity, and respect for people are emphasized.

Description: Boyer Candy Co. is a global confectionary leader headquartered in Altoona, PA.  For 85 years, Boyer has committed to producing exceptionally crafted chocolates, including the Mallo Cup, Clark Bar, Smoothie Cup, and Jimmie Stix.

Name: Dubai Sweet Factory
Description: Dubai Sweet Factory is an indulgent dessert haven that combines Dubai’s rich culinary heritage with international chocolate and pastry artistry. From handcrafted baklava to luxurious Dubai-themed chocolates, it offers a unique, immersive experience for all sweet lovers.

Name: Twinkle Lights
Description:
**Twinkle Lights – Sustainably Sweet, Naturally Strong**

**Twinkle Lights** is an innovative agro-industrial enterprise headquartered in Cameroon, dedicated to delivering sustainable solutions across three key sectors: **refined sugar production**, **insect protein farming**, and **ecological charcoal manufacturing**. Our integrated operations blend modern agricultural practices with traditional ecological wisdom to create high-quality, environmentally responsible products.

  **ICUMSA 45 Sugar Production**
CrystalCane specializes in the production and export of **ICUMSA 45 white refined sugar**, a premium-grade product known for its high purity, sparkling white color, and suitability for human consumption and food processing. Our sugar is produced using state-of-the-art refining processes that meet **international quality standards**, making it an ideal export product for global markets.

Whether for industrial use, large-scale food manufacturing, or direct retail, CrystalCane's sugar is trusted for its consistency, safety, and excellence.

 **Palm Larvae & Weevil Farming**
As a pioneer in **insect protein farming** in Central Africa, CrystalCane engages in the cultivation of **palm larvae (Rhynchophorus phoenicis)** and **palm weevils**, which are rich in protein, healthy fats, and essential micronutrients. These edible insects are harvested under controlled, hygienic conditions and serve as:
- A sustainable **food source** for human consumption
- A high-protein **animal feed alternative**
- A solution to food security and malnutrition challenges in sub-Saharan Africa

Our insect farming model is both **economically empowering** for rural communities and **environmentally regenerative**.

 **Ecological Charcoal Production**
CrystalCane is also committed to **renewable energy solutions** through the production of **ecological (eco) charcoal**. Unlike traditional charcoal, our product is made from **agricultural waste and renewable biomass**, offering:

Name: Asterism Artisan Chocolate LLC.
Description:
Asterism handmade bars and bonbon are made with top quality couverture chocolate, fine cane sugar and gourmet fillings.

Our artistic chocolates are more than delicious. The unique combinations of flavors and textures will delight any palate. They're hand crafted in Rochester, Michigan by your local chocolatier, Charlie.

Contact us at
Email: info@nsinigeria.org

Name: Brittle-Brittle, Inc.
Description:
Brittle-Brittle was founded in 1988 by a father and three sons  with the mission to produce all-natural, old-fashioned, hand-made candy products.  Building on the success and significant repeat business from a growing, loyal customer base, they began marketing their artisan crafted nut brittles, toffees and trail mix to small convenience stores, gift shops and grocery chains. Continued success at that level led to inclusion in regional and then national retail chains.

Produced in our BRC AA certified production facility Brittle-Brittle’s handmade, small batch process provides a unique taste and texture unlike other brittles and toffees. Made with honey and all natural ingredients using a proprietary recipe our products contain no preservatives and are gluten free.

Name: Droste Holland
Description:
De smaak van echte chocolade sinds 1863
Is het mogelijk dat je niet meer weet hoe echte chocolade smaakt? Hoe heerlijk het is als je de smaak van de cacaoboon wel proeft. Goed om te weten dat we bij Droste nog steeds chocolade maken zoals het hoort. Al sinds 1863. Droste, proef het verschil!

Name: Jutrzenka Dobre Miasto Sp. z o. o.
Description:
Tastiest fudges on the market!

We are one of the biggest sweets producers in Poland and a definite leader on the cream fudge market.
Years of experience, traditional recipes and highest quality ingredients allow us to make various top quality sweets.

Try some and give us your feedback!

Name: REBROWN SUGAR INDONESIA
Description:
Republic Brown Sugar is a leading producer of premium organic brown sugar, namely palm sugar and coconut sugar in Indonesia, serving national and international markets. We are committed to producing high quality products made from selected natural ingredients, without using dangerous chemicals. Each of our products is processed with modern technology but still maintains traditional methods to ensure authentic taste and the best quality.

As a producer who cares about the environment and the welfare of local farmers, we partner with farming communities in various regions in Indonesia to obtain quality raw materials while improving their welfare. With this approach, we not only focus on product quality, but also on the positive impact on society and the environment.

Our brown sugar products, namely palm sugar, and coconut sugar are available in the form of fine powdered granules to meet culinary and industrial needs throughout the world. Republic is committed to remaining innovative and responsive to global trends, providing products that meet international standards and are recognized for excellence in taste, health and sustainability.

With an extensive distribution network and professional team, Republic Brown Sugar is ready to be your trusted partner for your premium organic brown sugar needs, both for the domestic and global markets. Find purity and quality in every grain of sugar we produce.

Name: Baracao
Description:
Baracao est une entreprise familiale fondée par Blandine (la maman), qui a transmis son amour du chocolat à Priscille (la fille). 
Ensemble, nous travaillons du chocolat de qualité et surtout engagé, qui rémunère les cacaoculteurs au juste prix. 
Baracao évolue petit à petit dans la Vallée de Chevreuse et accueille maintenant des clients dans une magnifique boutique en centre-ville. 

Notre vision? 
Remettre l'artisanat sur le devant de la scène! 
C'est pour cela que notre atelier est visible, que nous proposons des ateliers, et que nous communiquons sur des valeurs authentiques. 

Nous sommes amoureuses du bon chocolat et du travail manuel, et nous efforcons de travailler cette merveilleuse matière qu'est le chocolat de la manière la plus juste possible. Se sourcer équitablement, en circuit court, et avec des matières premières nobles sont notre manière à nous d'avoir un impact.

Name: Divino Vício
Description:
A Empresa surgiu em 2014, com o propósito de produzir apenas ovos de páscoa. Até o ano de 2020 comprávamos  chocolate de terceiros e transformávamos em produtos, atualmente fabricamos nosso próprio chocolate.
Hoje, a Divino Vício é a empresa com maior número de licenças infantil no mercado.
 A empresa possui outras linhas como DivinoNut, Candy toys, Divino kids e a linha de barrinhas de chocolate.
Ao longo desses anos a Divino Vicio vem se consolidando no mercado devido a qualidade e constante inovação de nossos produtos. Presente em todos estados Brasileiros.

Name: DAZZLER CONFECTIONERY COMPANY PRIVATE LIMITED
Description:
DAZZLER CONFECTIONERY COMPANY PRIVATE LIMITED manufactures in India high quality sugar confectionery products using proprietary technology and know-how obtained from the Promoter’s long standing tradition of sugar confectionery manufacturing in Spain.
        	
We have in place technology and know-how that is based on the formulations and processes that we have developed over 50 years in the sugar confectionery business.

•      	Large (14g to 25g) hard-boiled candy lollipops up to 33% bubble gum filling.
 
•      	Small (8g to 12g) hard-boiled candy lollipops up to 20% bubble gum filling.
 
•      	Hard-boiled candy balls (8g) up to 20% bubble gum filling.

Most bubble gum filling: Our Bubble Gum Filled Lollipops have more bubble gum than any other brand.

Top quality flavours: The classic Spanish flavours that we have developed over the years have earned the reputation of being the best tasting lollipops in the market.

Functional packaging:  We have the capability to individually wrap the ball lollipops in three different formats: Ball wrap, Twist wrap and in a Flow wrap pouch.

Visit our website https://www.dazzler.in for more information

Name: Nandy's Candy
Description:
Nandy's Candy is more than just your typical candy store; it's a place where cherished memories and special moments are created. Nancy King, the founder, ensured that Nandy's Candy made a lasting impression on anyone who tasted their delicious treats. The candy is made in small batches using copper pots in the cheerful store at Maywood Mart, and it goes beyond satisfying a sweet tooth's craving. 

Nancy King opened the first premium handmade candy store in Jackson in 1980, and it has since become an integral part of many people's best memories and everyday special moments. Nandy's Candy is a must-visit place for children staying with their grandparents, a first stop for those who miss American truffles or fudge, and a place where you can find Jelly Belly's in every flavor, a Snoball in July, and chocolate-dipped strawberries from the one you love. It's also an excellent choice for a unique corporate gift.

Name: Pizzelle's Confections
Description: Pizzelle's Confections is an eclectic mix of edible art and culinary exploration. We bring our lifelong love of fine chocolate, culinary, and visual art to every creation. Our mission is to share our love and knowledge of chocolate and confections so that our customers have a greater understanding and appreciation of fine chocolate and confectionery art. A visit to Pizzelle's is an experience; we love what we do and have a great time doing it. We want all of you to have a great time during your visit with us. We always say: we take our chocolate very seriously - ourselves, not so much!

Name: Rinati
Description:
L'azienda Rinati nasce intorno al 1890. I suoi prodotti, specialmente i Brigidini, il Torrone, le Cialde di Montecatini e i Cenci di Carnevale sono diventati i simboli di una tradizione tramandata di generazione e generazione. Oggi Rinati è presente sia nel mercato italiano che in quello estero.

I nostri dolci raggiungono tutta Italia (e anche l’estero), prendendo parte alla vita delle comunità. Nel tempo, grazie ai nostri collaboratori, l’aroma del Brigidino Rinati è diventato l’inconfondibile profumo di fiera, di famiglia e ricordi di infanzia. Un prodotto speciale, presente nel quotidiano anche in molti negozi, alimentari e supermercati. Rinati deve la sua più grande invenzione alla curiosità di scoprire se un torrone meno cotto, e quindi più morbido, è davvero buono.
Con questo spirito, sperimenta quotidianamente nuovi sapori, ascoltando le diverse esigenze delle persone, rispetto a gusti e intolleranze.

Una piccola idea, poi una realtà imprenditoriale. 
Oggi Rinati è il simbolo delle feste paesane e dello stare insieme. Comunità, tradizione e spontaneità, sono gli ingredienti della nostra azienda.

Name: El Chavito, Inc.
Description:
El Chavito started in San Diego, California, in 2015. Our founder created a signature spice rub for dried fruit snacks and candy. He originally sold the product himself into AM/PMs, 7-Elevens, and liquor stores throughout Southern California. Almost immediately, demand exploded - including from non-Hispanic markets. He discovered that his proprietary spice rub had a tremendous cross-cultural appeal.
 
In July 2017, El Chavito launched with Core-Mark, West Coast, a leader in convenience store distribution. Seven months later, in February 2018, Core-Mark expanded our 25-item product line nationally. 
  
Our portfolio includes 25 delicious candies. We can be merchandised on a stand-alone rack or Inline. Our propriety spices set us apart from our competition and allow our product to appeal to diverse markets. The combination of our repacked items and our signature spice is why we are demanded by name- El Chavito!

Name: VIVIL A. Müller GmbH & Co. KG
Description: VIVIL steht seit Generationen für zuckerfreien Genuss – fruchtig, minzig, erfrischend. Ob im Büro, auf Reisen oder unterwegs: Unsere Bonbons passen in jede Tasche und sind der perfekte Begleiter für kleine Pausen im Alltag.

Name: YummyComb
Description:
Hand crafted Honeycomb smothered in luxury Belgian milk & dark chocolate. Gluten free & Palm oil free offering a vegan friendly range too. Working with wholesalers, overseas distribution & direct.

A sweet tooth, an eye for the unusual with a heart full of tradition run alongside our strong family values, these are the foundations of Yummycomb.  We are a family business with our chief taste tester being our young son Teddy.  He certainly knows what he likes, and he loves Yummycomb! Along with limiting Teddy’s YummyComb consumption, we ensure only the finest sustainable Belgian chocolate is used to smother our delicious honeycomb and nothing, but 100% natural flavourings can make their way into our products.

Honeycomb is special to us, it’s a staple of the good old British traditional confectionery industry. Honeycomb was introduced to us by our grandparents on cold winter nights at the local fairground in large clear bags.  The taste of slightly burnt toffee and smell of candy floss is a fond childhood memory and the basis of our traditional product with a modern twist. 

Alongside honeycomb who doesn’t love chocolate? If your going to do chocolate, you may as well do it right. It must be high quality, high cocoa content giving the perfect blanket to accompany our nostalgic cinder toffee (honeycomb to you Southerners!).

We have worked hard on our honeycomb/chocolate combinations and use prominent popular chocolate flavours, alongside our UNIQUE easy to eat shapes and sizes to create our YummyComb range.

We are proud of our British traditional confectionery offering and are super excited to bring our range into the modern world. Feel free to send us a message of your favourite childhood confectionery memories but while delving through your memory banks why not enjoy one of our delicious.

Name: Lanka Sugar Company (Pvt) Ltd - Official
Description:
Lanka Sugar Company Private Limited (LSCL) is a fully government-owned company under the Treasury of Sri Lanka, managed by the Ministry of Industries. The company’s main focus is to achieve self-sufficiency in sugar production, thereby saving a significant amount of foreign exchange that is currently spent on importing sugar into Sri Lanka.

In addition, LSCL is actively involved in managing and further developing the sugarcane industry in agro-economic zones across Sri Lanka, particularly at its Pelwatte and Sevanagala facilities. To support these efforts, the Government of Sri Lanka has allocated 130,000 hectares of land, primarily in the dry and arid zones of the country, where irrigation facilities are available.

The development of the sugarcane industry will not only help uplift the socio-economic standards of rural farmers but also create employment opportunities in various supporting and associated industries. Service providers in the sector will also benefit from this growth.

LSCL is actively seeking investments to further develop sugarcane cultivation and sugar mills in Sri Lanka’s North, East, North Central, and Uva provinces.

Name: Renata Arassiro Chocolates
Description:
Produtos artesanais feitos com chocolate belga de altíssima qualidade e as mais apuradas técnicas de chocolataria, multipremiados por renomados cadernos gastronômicos de todo o país. 

Desde 2008 presente no ranking das melhores lojas de chocolates em São Paulo pela Revista Veja, Comer & Beber e premiada em 2012 e 2013 como O Melhor Chocolate. 

Premiada como O melhor Chocolate Gourmet pela Revista Época em 2011 e premiada em 2014 com O melhor Ovo de Páscoa pelos jornal  Folha de São Paulo e em 2014 e 2018 pelo jornal O Estado de São Paulo. Conhecida por utilizar em sua linha de produtos vários ingredientes típicos do Brasil  e de apresentar técnicas modernas e inovadoras no design de seus chocolates. 

Todos os nossos produtos, possuem personalidade única e são assinados pela Chef Renata Arassiro, a Primeira Embaixadora da Barry Callebaut no Brasil e referência nacional em chocolate.

Name: Société Nationale du Sucre (SNS)
Description:
English

National Sugar Company is developing a landmark integrated sugar agro-industrial project in Mauritania under a Public-Private Partnership (PPP) framework.
The project covers the full value chain—from farming and processing to refined sugar, ethanol, and bio-energy—offering strong fundamentals, government backing, and long-term growth potential for strategic investors.

Français

La Société Nationale du Sucre développe un projet agro-industriel intégré de production de sucre en Mauritanie, structuré dans le cadre d’un partenariat public-privé (PPP).
Le projet couvre l’ensemble de la chaîne de valeur, de l’agriculture à la transformation, incluant le sucre raffiné, l’éthanol et l’énergie, et offre aux investisseurs une opportunité stratégique à fort impact et à long terme.

Description:

With a commitment to quality and innovation, we  also offer a wide range of delicious popcorn flavors tailored for not only fundraising but also, corporate solutions, special events, catering, and personal enjoyment. Whether you're planning a fundraiser, seeking innovative business solutions, organizing a special occasion, or simply indulging in a snack, Popcorn Dreamz has something for everyone. 

Our mission is to delight customers with exceptional products and service, turning every moment into a pop of excitement and flavor. Join us on a journey of taste and imagination with Popcorn Dreamz – where every kernel holds the promise of something extraordinary

Distribuímos felicidade em forma de brownies e várias delícias!

Name: Kadayifzade Gourmet Turkish Sweets
Description: Kadayifzade, offers signature kadayif, baklava and Turkish sweets with a heritage spanning 160 years. Our signature sweets include the Extra Pistachio Kadayif, Kadayif with Kaymak – a creamy churned butter akin to clotted cream and Burma Kadayif, made with twisted shredded pastry, delectable nuts and syrup. The delectable beverage menu includes superb coffees, a variety of mocktails with unique fusions and the famous Turkish tea.

Name: Sweetmania
Description:
Sweetmania is a Polish family-owned company specializing in the import and distribution of confectionery products for the B2B market.
For over 30 years, we have been creating and delivering products based on our own original, patented concepts — unique ideas distinguished by design, creativity, and quality.

We develop two strong in-house brands: Candy Gangs and Nuclear Strike – concepts crafted especially for children and young consumers.
Our portfolio also includes seasonal and occasion-based products (Halloween, Christmas, Easter, Valentine’s Day), which have long been one of the pillars of our sales.

We work with major retail chains, distributors, and international partners, supplying our products to over 30 countries worldwide.

Name: Basically Healthy

Basically Healthy is built on the idea that wellness shouldn’t come
with rules or guilt. We reimagine it through better-for-you
treats that are as fun as they are functional - letting you enjoy
candy that actually does something for you. Think Willy Wonka,

Description: Wij hebben ons gespecialiseerd in het ontwikkelen en ambachtelijk produceren van bonbons, truffels en chocoladegeschenken. Description:
Founded in 1980, IBE (Ilyas Brothers Engineering) has been a pioneer in the confectionery industry for over four decades. Based in Pakistan, we specialize in designing, manufacturing, and maintaining state-of-the-art confectionery machinery. Our commitment to quality, innovation, and customer satisfaction has established us as a trusted leader in the field.

At IBE, we understand the intricate needs of the confectionery industry. Our products are crafted with precision engineering to ensure optimal performance and efficiency, helping our clients produce the finest confectionery products. Our expertise spans a wide range of machinery, tailored to meet the diverse requirements of our global clientele.

Our Core Values:

- Quality: We deliver products that meet the highest standards of excellence.

- Customer Satisfaction: We prioritize our clients' needs and ensure their

Connect with us to learn more about our cutting-edge technology and how we can help your business thrive. Follow our page for updates, industry insights, and the latest news about our products and services.

Name: GOMITAS INOOVAN
Description:
Gomitas Inoovan es una empresa dedicada a la fabricación de gomitas de grenetina, ubicada en Valle de Chalco, Estado de México. Nuestra misión es crear productos deliciosos y de alta calidad que traen alegría a todas las edades, utilizando ingredientes seleccionados y procesos innovadores. Nos esforzamos por ser una marca reconocida a nivel nacional por nuestra dedicación a la excelencia y la satisfacción de nuestros clientes.

Ofrecemos una amplia variedad de gomitas en diferentes formas, sabores y colores, todas hechas con los más altos estándares de calidad. En Gomitas Inoovan, valoramos la innovación, el compromiso con la calidad y la satisfacción del cliente, lo que nos impulsa a mejorar continuamente.

Trabajar en Gomitas Inoovan significa ser parte de un entorno dinámico y en crecimiento, donde cada miembro del equipo es fundamental para el éxito de la empresa. Fomentamos una cultura de colaboración, respeto y desarrollo profesional.

Description:
The Cape Town-based sweet specialists at Meshuggah handcraft irresistible candy and confectionery! The secret ingredients that make our bespoke candy creations sensational include a passion for people, their skills, and the finest quality ingredients, just to name a few. 

We are innovative and passionate about our work in the sugar and confectionery product industry, focused on creating delicious flavours and beautiful artisanal chocolates, fudges, brittles, marshmallows, and more!

The Meshuggah sweet artisans also customise our exclusive confectionary to suit your brand, event theme, and corporate colours! Contact us to add unique fun and flavour to your world.

Name: UMAM Cukiernia Gdańska

Wykorzystujemy sprawdzone i smakowite składniki takie jak: mąka najwyższej jakości, naturalne puree z owoców, belgijska i francuska czekolada, wanilia z Madagaskaru i oczywiście świeże owoce. Name: Daelmans Stroopwafels.com
Description:
Daelmans Stroopwafels
At Daelmans we are totally mad about Stroopwafels. It is our passion! That is why we enjoy making the most delicious Daelmans Stroopwafels every day. Two crispy waffles filled with a delicious caramel syrup filling, made with the best ingredients. We have maintained this tradition of dedicated craftsmanship at Daelmans since 1904 and we are fully committed to this every day. Because that is the only way we can get to offer the No. 1 Stroopwafel. Have you had a real Daelmans Stroopwafel? It’s very likely, because our Stroopwafels are all over the world. People don’t just love our special cookie in the Netherlands. Everywhere we go, people just love the Daelmans Stroopwafel as we do, from the very first bite. A big compliment to our bakers who make our authentic Stroopwafel so crispy and smooth at the same time.

Daelmans Stroopwafels Assortment
Our caramel Stroopwafels come in various shapes and sizes. In addition to a well-filled Hexa Box, we also have individually wrapped Jumbo and Mini Stroopwafels. Handy to hand out or serve with a nice cup of coffee or tea. In addition to the traditional caramel stroopwafel, there are many other tasty Stroopwafels available in our webshop. Have you ever tried our chocolate, maple or honey Stroopwafels? A surprising variation of the tastiest cookie from the Netherlands. You can also go to the Daelmans webshop for gluten-free Stroopwafels. This way everyone can enjoy this unique cookie!

WARM IT UP ON TOP OF YOUR CUP!
A Daelmans Stroopwafel is a delicious treat. But have you ever tried to heat up the Stroopwafel on top of your cup of coffee or tea? This tradition makes the butter syrup filling between the waffles melt a little. We don’t have to explain what happens when you take a bite! Discover your favorite Stroopwafel in our webshop.

Name: Al-Noor Sugar Mills
Description: Al-Noor Sugar Mills Limited was incorporated in Pakistan on August 08, 1969 as a public limited company under the Companies Act, 1913 (now Companies Act 2017). The Company is listed on Pakistan Stock Exchanges Limited. The principal activities of the Company are manufacturing sugar, medium density fiber (MDF) board, power generation and its sale. The registered office of the company is situated at 96-A, Sindhi Muslim Society, Karachi in the province of Sindh and the manufacturing facilities are located at Shahpur Jahania, District Shaheed Benizer Bhutto Abad (Nawabshah) in the province of Sindh.

Name: Yummy Confectionery
Description:
Yummy Confectionery is one of the most well -known confectionery in Indore and in Madhya Pradesh. We are basically located in Indore, and we trade across the country. We have multiple tie-ups with big organizations. We have been in the Confectionery sector for more than a decade. 

Yummy Confectionery works on an aim purpose and we have one aim in the principle book, which is to satisfy every customer whether it is budget-related or product related. Our clients are so happy with the services which are provided by us, Our advice is related to their budget and the product which they want to purchase. We believe and we worked in cost-effective and quality products with a quality taste theme.

In this fast and forward world, we would like to give our contribution also to the Confectionery sector, Working and having experience over a decade will definitely help us to grow together.

Name: Puffy's Bakery
Description:
Puffy's Bakery is a Swiss-based bakery that offers a wide range of fresh, handcrafted cookies, cakes, and other baked goods. 

The bakery prides itself on using high-quality ingredients, including locally sourced products such as Swiss chocolate to create delicious treats that are both wholesome and indulgent.

In addition to its regular menu items, Puffy's Bakery also offers seasonal specials and custom orders for special occasions such as weddings, birthdays, and corporate events.

Puffy’s Bakery is dedicated to baking with the best ingredients, supporting local producers whenever possible and spreading happiness throughout our communities.

Name: Maria Chocolate Portugal
Description:
A marca Maria Chocolate nasceu em 2013, fruto do amor da Família Monteiro pelo chocolate. São chocolates criados por mãos delicadas e dedicadas a adoçar a vida das pessoas.
Nossa missão é oferecer aos nossos clientes a magia resultante do trabalho artesanal, dando a conhecer a todos a fórmula do prazer, com o toque especial das nossas receitas.
Empenhamo-nos para que, a cada dia, o mundo Maria Chocolate alcance o maior número de pessoas, proporcionando a oportunidade de conhecer e experimentar nossos deliciosos produtos.
Como uma marca comprometida com a qualidade e transparência, procuramos abraçar projetos e parcerias que, acreditamos, não só agregar valor á nossa marca, mas, também, trazer ganhos diretos aos nossos potenciais clientes.
Por isso, nosso trabalho traz o amor pelo chocolate e o prazer em fazer parte de momentos especiais e da criação de boas memórias através dos nossos sabores.

Name: Chocoland Sweden
Description:
På Chocoland brinner vi för choklad av högsta kvalitet. Vår resa började med en enkel passion – att dela den äkta chokladupplevelsen med fler. Vi väljer noggrant ut våra råvaror och samarbetar med producenter som delar vår vision om smak, kvalitet och hållbarhet.

Hos oss hittar du allt från klassiska favoriter till spännande nyheter, alltid med fokus på att skapa njutning i varje bit. Oavsett om det gäller vardagslyx, en uppskattad gåva eller ett större evenemang vill vi att vår choklad ska göra stunden oförglömlig.

Chocoland.se är mer än bara choklad – det är en smakresa fylld av passion, omsorg och kärlek till det vi gör

Name: TOP CANDY SL
Description:
Desde su establecimiento en 2005, Top Candy ha dedicado sus esfuerzos a la fabricación, distribución y exportación de caramelos fusionados con diversas figuras de plástico y sus reconocidos malvaviscos.

Top Candy se distingue por ofrecer productos que destacan por su intenso sabor y originalidad, presentando envases cuidadosamente empaquetados.

Ha logrado una expansión exitosa en todas las comunidades autónomas de España, incluyendo Ceuta y Melilla, y a su vez, ha establecido acuerdos comerciales en 13 países. 

Candy-viértete!

Name: Roozbeh Chocolate
Description:
Roozbeh Chocolate Food Industries Co. started its mission in 1995 in the field of research and development, manufacturing and supplying products with high quality and fair prices for confectionery, bakery and chocolate industries according to the following principles:

+ Supplying all the ingredients of the pastry and confectionery industry with the aim of resolving production concerns of the confectioneries and helping them to focus more on sales

+ Creating added value and reducing the production costs of confectioneries

+ Manufacturing and supplying of confectionery raw materials (pastry, bakery and cake decorating ingredients) in line with the world modern products and pastries

+ Emphasizing on local and international competitive ability in the areas of quality, price, product diversity, packaging, distribution and sales

+ Localization of the products and pastry ingredients according to the features of confectioneries and local customers

Name: The Kansas City Brittle & Toffee Co., CST Sweets
Description:
Since 2003, CST Sweets, founded by Tracy Shiner, has been a delightful destination for artisanal confections. From humble beginnings in Basehor, KS, Tracy's passion for crafting sweets has blossomed into a thriving enterprise.

At CST Sweets, we specialize in creating handcrafted treats that tantalize taste buds and evoke nostalgic cravings. Our signature product, the renowned BACON Brittle, stands as a testament to our innovative spirit and commitment to pushing culinary boundaries.

In addition to our beloved brittles, we offer a delectable array of confections including handcrafted toffees, indulgent peanut butter cups, sumptuous truffles, irresistible pecan turtles, and luscious caramels.

But our indulgences don't stop there. CST Sweets is also home to gourmet popcorn that is simply unparalleled. With flavors ranging from the comforting warmth of Cinnamon and the savory richness of White Cheddar to the classic sweetness of Caramel, our popcorn creations are sure to satisfy every craving. And for the ultimate indulgence, try our signature ULTIMATE blend—caramel popcorn, candied pecans, drizzled with both white and dark chocolate—a true symphony of flavors.

At CST Sweets, we believe in the art of indulgence, crafting each treat with love and attention to detail. Join us on a journey of sweet delights, where every bite is a moment of pure bliss.

CST Sweets offers the perfect solution for all your gifting needs, making every occasion a little sweeter. Our artisanal confections are not only a delightful treat for the taste buds but also a thoughtful gesture that leaves a lasting impression.

When it comes to corporate end-of-year gifting, CST Sweets shines as the ultimate choice. Whether you're expressing gratitude to clients, showing appreciation to employees, or simply spreading holiday cheer, our handcrafted sweets are guaranteed to leave a lasting impression.

Name: Muhabbet Turkish Delight
Description:
WELCOME TO MUHABBET TURKİSH DELİGHT
We work with the highest efficiency in our sector to provide you with high-quality and reliable products. Constantly renewing and improving ourselves, we strive to better meet today's expectations. Our production is based on your satisfaction. All our products are natural, and we do not use synthetic or harmful substances. Our Turkish delights are gluten-free and gelatin-free, making them suitable for vegetarians and vegans, except those containing honey.

We export to approximately five countries, including the U.S. and EU nations. After you place your order, we handle all procedures and deliver right to your door.

Our production takes place in Istanbul, and we collaborate with many partners across Turkey in different sweet categories, such as Turkish baklava, chocolate, dried fruits, and more. We meet your needs from these partners at the best wholesale prices and organize your shipment efficiently. Please feel free to contact us for any requests.

We operate solely on a wholesale basis, with no retail sales. You will receive the best quality products from our company at the best wholesale prices.

Additionally, we offer custom packaging design with your logo. If you order a container of our Turkish delights, we provide FREE PACKAGING DESIGN WITH YOUR LOGO.

Contact us to create your own branded Turkish delight.

Name: Lisa's Popcorn
Description:
Lisa's Popcorn isn't just about our unique flavors, and its
more than just a snack. Our happiness, love and passion
is something you feel the second you pop open a bag
and the smell of white chocolate, cheddar or candy hits
your nose. It started in a home kitchen, as a small gesture
to show appreciation to neighbors and friends. It has
grown into something that we hope follows you through
life's important events that just have to include popcorn.
From your first movie date, with your soon to be true love
that brushed your hand as you reached into the popcorn
bowl. To your family movie nights, with your kids running
wild only to settle down with Disney and their favorite
flavor of popcorn in their favorite color bowl. To your
celebrations, both big and small. To when you have your
grandkids visiting your cozy living room, give them
something they will always remember and cherish with
their family. Here is to years of happiness, love and good
memories. Welcome to the family, we hope you stay a
lifetime.

Name: Candy Star Lollipop
Description:
Candy Star Lolipop kurulduğu 2010 yılından itibaren hep daha iyiyi ve kaliteyi düstur edinmiş, Siz değerli iş ortaklarımızın güveniyle bu günlere gelmiştir

Lolipop şeker üretiminde Türkiye pazarına birçok konuda öncülük etmiş birçok yenilikler getirmiş ve ARGE çalışmalarına devam ederek gelecekte birçok yeni ürün için çalışmalarını devam ettirmektedir. Yurtiçi pazarında Türkiye’nin dört bir yerine dağılmış bayi ağına her geçen gün yenilerini ekleyerek sizlere daha yakın olmayı hedeflemektedir.%100 Yerli sermaye ile kurulan, hedefleri doğrultusunda öncelikle Avrupa başta olmak üzere bir çok ülkeye ihracat yaparak sektörde hep bir adım önde olmuş, kaliteden müşteri memnuniyetinden ödün vermeden Global bir şirket olma yönünde hızla ilerlemektedir.

Daha Çok istihdam ile ülke ekonomisine katkı sağlamayı, modern üretim teknolojilerine uyum sağlayarak büyümeyi ve kaliteyi arttırmayı hedefleyen firmamız bu yolda hızla ilerlemektedir

Sizleri de hedeflerimiz doğrultusunda iş ortaklarımız arasında görmekten mutluluk duyarız


Candy Star Lollipop

Name: Confeitaria Cereja Doces
Description:
Somos a Cereja Doces, mais do que uma marca, somos apaixonadas pela arte da confeitaria!
Nossos doces são feitos com paixão, cuidado e dedicação.
Sabemos que em cada pedido existe o desejo de criar memórias e afeto.
Na Cereja Doces, a tradição encontra a inovação, criando um universo de experiências que encantam paladares e aquecem corações.
Junte-se a nós nessa jornada de sabores autênticos e momentos inesquecíveis. Bem-vindo ao mundo da Cereja Doces, onde cada doce é uma história, e cada história é doce.

Magic Colours are proud to be one of the leading brands in the sugarcraft industry,  specializing and taking proud of manufacturing a wide range of 100% edible, safe and easy cake craft products.

Name: Sweet Guyz
Description: Welcome to Sweet Guyz, our mission is to be Ireland and the UK’s largest Online Confectionary retail store! While Sweet Guyz is a new brand it has come about from over 30 years’ experience within the confectionery business. Born in the front room in a house in Armagh the founder Charlie Guy. He grew his confectionery company; Charlie had always had an eye for the trends and what was going to sell and what was the latest fad.

Name: Cacau Melt
Description:
Somos uma Chocolataria 100% Pelotense.
Nascemos na cidade do doce no ano de 2015, muito despretensiosos, na época vendíamos apenas Alfajor.
Com o tempo fomos percebendo um amor muito grande pela confeitaria, e todos os doces que podíamos produzir. Mas esse tempo foi passando, e vimos  que esse amor todo estava em trabalhar com produtos cuja sua matéria prima era o chocolate.
Recentemente passamos por um reposicionamento de marca, onde de fato, deixamos de ser uma Confeitaria, e embarcamos nesse universo que é a  Chocolataria.
A Cacau Melt vem com o objetivo de trazer produtos de qualidade, com chocolates selecionados e feitos por especialistas.
Não queremos apenas "vender um produto", queremos trazer experiência inesquecíveis para os nossos clientes.
Hoje nós temos uma loja 100% virtual, e o contato com o nosso cliente é através de redes sociais e aplicativos, mas o projeto é expandir ainda mais e investir em um local onde nossos clientes possam ir presencialmente.
Trabalhamos com diversas linhas, desde infantis, até produtos para eventos.

Name: Alter Ego Cannabis Co.
Description: Cannabis Company

Name: Madhur Confectioners Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Madhur Confectioners has been serving tantalizing confectioneries in India since 1996. We produce a wide variety of delectable confectionary products including lollipops, candies, chocolates and much more.

Our Managing Directors Mr Mahendra Gulwani and Mr Pradeep Gulwani laid the foundation of Madhur with a capacity of 5 MT per month. We currently produce 1000 MT of production per month in our manufacturing unit based in Indore. 

In the past 3 decades, we have successfully established our name globally and exported premium quality confectioneries to around 26 countries. Madhur Confectioners is HACCP, ISO 9001 & 22000, FSSAI, and HALAL, FDA certified. Our products are made from high-grade raw materials & ingredients.

Name: La Tribu Du Chocolà
Description:
Bonjour à tous! 

Votre nouvelle chocolaterie, confiserie Valenciennoise! 

Chocolaterie, confiserie locale engagée qui souhaite vous partager au travers de gourmandises , le savoir faire artisanal du métier de chocolatier/confiseur, le goût des bons produits locaux et bio si possible. 

Nous confectionnons les produits maison , tous sont uniques car nous avons fait le pari de ne pas utiliser de machines, dans une démarche écologique et de maintien du savoir faire.
Nous utilisons les techniques traditionnelles du métier. 

Nos valeurs sont aussi celles du circuit court, du local et du bio quand on le peut. 
Nos produits sont élaborés avec les fruits de saison , le chocolat est Français, bio et provient de coopératives équitables et éthiques . Les fruits secs sont français  (exception pour les pistaches car les producteurs français sont sur le coup  mais n'ont pas encore assez de rendement pour le moment, affaire à suivre ). 

Pour l'emballage , nous avons fait le choix d'un emballage Kraft avec tamponnage manuel à l'encre biodégradable. 

Des personnalisations sont réalisées pour vous mettre en avant sur des foires, des salons, pour des cadeaux de remerciement auprès de clients, partenaires ou salariés. En effet, nous proposons des gourmandises avec le logo de votre entreprise. 

Enfin, le site internet de la Tribu du Chocolà vous permet de retrouver les divers produits disponibles  (on étudie toute demande).  

Au plaisir de vous rencontrer et d'échanger ensemble .

Name: Lalonde
Description: Artisan confiseur-chocolatier depuis 1850 à Nancy.

Name: Maison Raphaëlle
Description:
Maison Raphaëlle a été fondée en 2022, portée par l'envie de revisiter les traditionnels produits de la confiserie avec des créations d'exceptions en utilisant des produits qui le sont tout autant. 

Les saveurs de nos confiseries sont inédites et élaborées selon des méthodes traditionnelles et artisanales, sans aucun additif ni conservateur.

Cuites en petites quantités dans des casseroles de cuivre, chaque confiserie est soigneusement préparées, chaque ingrédient est intégré avec équilibre pour trouver sa place exacte et exprimer tout son goût.

C'est dans notre atelier, à Bidart, que nous sélectionnons les fleurs comestibles au grès des saisons et en étroite collaboration avec des producteurs locaux.

Soucieux de notre impact environnemental, nos confiseries sont emballées et livrées dans des sachets biodégradables et recyclables.

Name: Sugarfed Punjab
Description: The Punjab State Federation of Cooperative Sugar Mills Ltd is an apex body of Nine Cooperative Sugar Mills in the state, located at Ajnala, Batala, Bhogpur, Budhewal, Fazilka, Gurdaspur, Morinda, Nakodar and Nawanshahr with crushing capacity of 17750 TCD. As per the guidelines issued by Punjab Government, E-tendering have been introduced in purchasing above Rs.5.00 lacs as well as for sale of molasses and sugar. Sugar Sale Depots have been opened at main road gate of all sugar mills where special efforts are being made for retail sale of sugar under Fateh Brand in 1kg. 5kg. and 10kg and 25 kg packing directly to consumers. Efforts are also being made to enter into production & sale of Gur and Sakkar in some of sugar mills.

Name: Fräulein Lisa Biscuit Factory
Description:
THE NEW WAY OF MODERN BAKERY

Die kleinen, leckeren und keksigen Biscuits wurden zum  Markenzeichen von FRÄULEIN LISA
Bei Fräulein Lisa haben wir den traditionellen Keks mit dem Geschmack aus Kindheitstagen 
in unsere „neue“ Zeit übertragen. 
Authentische (vegane) Biscuits ohne künstliche Aromen.

Hochwertige und geschmackgebende intensive Zutaten wie reines natürliches Zitronenöl, dunkle Schokolade, Karamell aus eigener Herstellung und auch zarte Zutaten wie blanchierte Mandeln und echte Vanille sind in den Biscuits der Hauptdarsteller.

Sie überzeugen nicht nur durch die unverwechselbare Form, sondern auch dadurch, dass sie ohne Palmfette produziert werden.

Damit setzen wir bei Fräulein Lisa einen neuen Trend und bereichern Veganer und Nicht-Veganer mit unserem leckeren und hochwertigen Sortiment.

Für diese handgefertigten Produkte entstand eine außergewöhnliche Verpackung. Die stilvollen Boxen mit dem Tragegriff passend gestaltet zu jeder Sorte machen sie zum perfekten Geschenk für jeden Anlass. 
Ob als Mitbringsel für Freunde oder Familie, als süße Überraschung für Ihre Lieben oder einfach zum selber genießen.

Mit unserer ready2Snack Linie genießen Sie unsere mini Biscuits unterwegs, im Office und als kleinen keksigen Snack zu Ihrem Heißgetränk.

Name: Onkar Group
Description:
Onkar Group (Onkar Sakhar Karkhana Pvt. Ltd.) stands among Maharashtra’s foremost sugar producers, blending deep agricultural roots with modern innovation.

From our beginnings in Chandapuri, Solapur, we’ve grown from a 2,500 TCD crushing capacity to 7.2 million metric tons annually, driven by our unwavering commitment to excellence and progress.

Our strength lies in our people — 800,000 farmers, 200,000 labourers, and 8,000 employees — a thriving ecosystem that embodies our belief in community-driven growth.

Guided by a vision of sustainable development and rural empowerment, Onkar Group continues to lead with responsibility, innovation, and purpose.

Name: Fraktals
Description: Handmade in Aurora, ON, fraktals sources the highest quality ingredients for a mouth-watering taste experience. Notes of Canadian maple syrup are highlighted in fraktals’ spectacular buttercrunch core. fraktals’ buttercrunch resides in between two layers of Belgian chocolate (both original milk chocolate and new 70% dark chocolate), finished with a sprinkle of raw cashews. Production in small batches allows this artisanal treat to be handmade from the initial stirring of the buttercrunch to the finishing touch of a hand tied ribbon. One bite and you will know why we say: “a little too much is just enough”.   Our Products Milk Chocolate Each Milk Chocolate fraktal provides an unmatched taste experience. The velvety buttercrunch core, with notes of maple, is flanked between two layers of Belgian milk chocolate and finished with a sprinkle of raw cashew pieces. Made in small batches, this artisanal treat is handmade each step of the way, from the stirring of the buttercrunch to the hand-tying of each ribbon. Dark Chocolate fraktal’s is known for its unrivalled taste. For those who love dark chocolate and dark chocolate newbies alike, this formula is balanced without any of the bitterness of extra dark chocolate, delivering a spectacular taste. The velvety buttercrunch core with a hint of maple is flanked between two layers of Belgian 70% dark chocolate and then finished with a sprinkle of raw cashews.   We Use Organic & High Quality Ingredients Blanc Maple Syrup Cultivated from Blanc's maple grove in Notre-Dame-des-Bois, this 100% pure organic maple syrup meets the highest quality standards, is certified organic by Écocert Canada and meets all Canada Organic Regime specifications as well as USDA Organic specifications. Delicate yet rich in flavour, Blanc Maple Syrup is selected based on a strict set of criteria that deliver the unique flavour profile you find in all our products. Blanc Maple Syrup is a key part to what makes fraktals' buttercrunch so irresistible. Finest Belgian Chocolate When it comes to sourcing chocolate for fraktals, we go right to the best. We use the highest quality Belgian chocolate for the best taste. You can rely on the delicious taste and quality of the finest Belgian milk and dark chocolate, as it remains constant – today, tomorrow and always.

Description:
Taste of the Rockies combines the sweetness of confectionery with the spirit of the Rockies. For over eight decades, we’ve been crafting unique souvenir candies, snack mixes, and custom-labeled treats that allow people to share a taste of Colorado wherever they go. 
Local heritage meets global reach — with Colorado roots, we ship nationwide and deliver gifts that celebrate place and flavor.

Description:
Amporios Patisserie is a premium bakery with an ambience that resembles international paradigms. The onset of this business started in June 2012 with a sole focus to outperform and create new standards in the F&B industry by simply exceeding FDA requirements.

The intention was pure and eternal, Amporios wanted to make sure its customers eat healthy and hygienic food. With a huge amount of experience in Food and Beverages industry the owner had immense knowledge about how the industry operates. Thus, exceeding FDA’s requirement the facility was built using PU Anti-bacterial paints, seamless ceilings, central fresh air and exhaust system.

Amporios is a well-planned patisserie which is capable of mass production. Amporios manufacturers dry products, bar cakes, loafs, muffins etc. Its current production is 3500 products every day and it’s structured to manufacture between both units a minimum of 7,000 products a day. Name: Caribbean Sugar Ltd
Description:
Caribbean Sugar Ltd sells the finest sugar in the world from our base in Barbados We have subsidiaries in the UK and US and distribution across the Caribbean, UK, US and EU.  We’re proudly Caribbean and that’s reflected in our board, our culture and our support for local manufacturing and the communities that depend on it. 

Small islands like Barbados have long struggled to compete with the large producers that dominate global sugar production. So, we decided to do things differently. For a start, our sugar is sustainably sourced from small farmers and purchased direct from the mill to ensure that every grain benefits local communities. Then we sell direct to end-customers in regional and export markets, rather than through traditional traders and middlemen. This Direct Trade relationship means that we’re able to pay more than double the market price for the sugar we buy and that’s, quite simply, fairer for everyone.

Caribbean Sugar Ltd is a member of the HADCO group of companies.

BIO & VEGAN

Name: Formosa Chocolates
Description:
Formosa Chocolates is a Taiwanese-American woman owned, artisanal chocolatier based in San Rafael, CA (San Francisco Bay Area). Our name is a tribute to our heritage. Formosa means “beautiful,” in Portuguese -- and is taken from “Ilha Formosa,” a name Portuguese sailors dubbed the island when they first spotted its beautiful coast in 1542.

Our work has been featured in the Michelin Guide, Consumer Reports, Bon Appétit, the Food Network, SF Chronicle, and 世界日報 (World Journal).  

Warm Taiwanese hospitality and Asian gift-giving traditions are important cornerstones of our company. We take particular delight in crafting elegant boxes of chocolates for all of life’s celebrations, when only the best will do. We also offer fully customizable boxes for corporate gifting that are sure to delight and impress even the most discerning of recipients

Science Behind Cotton Candy Workshops 

And Corporate Collaboration

Launched in August 2024, we've grown from 27 community events in our first year to over 60 in 2025 alone—with growth in sales and a jump in profits. With a lean, low-overhead model and strong customer demand, Heart of Cart has proven that even part-time passion can build full-time impact.

We’re not just selling sweets—we’re delivering experiences, smiles, and memories (plus a little sparkle).

 Let's make your next event unforgettable.
